u"A CHEAP AND FAST MOVING SUB THAT DOES NOT REQUIRE AMMUNITION FROM AN ARMCENTER. WHILE THEY DO NOT POSSESS MUCH ARMOR, THEIR SPEED AND THE RATE OF FIRE FOR THEIR HF CANNON MAKE SENTINELS EFFECTIVE IN PACKS OR WHEN SUPPORTED BY LARGER SUBMARINES."
u"ANOTHER CHEAP AND MANEUVERABLE SMALL SUBMARINE, HUNTERS ARE ARMED WITH SMALL TORPEDOES AND ARE EFFECTIVE AT DISTRACTING THE ENEMY WHILST LARGER SUBS MOVE IN FOR THE KILL."

u"A POWERFUL SUBMARINE WITH GOOD ARMOR AND ARMED WITH LARGE TORPEDOES. WHILE EXPERT AT ASSAULTING ENEMY DEFENSIVE LINES ITS COSTS, FOR PRODUCTION, MAINTENANCE AND REPAIR, ARE QUITE HIGH. CRUISERS REQUIRE AMMUNITION REPLENISHMENT FROM ARMCENTERS."

u"A SPECIAL SUBMARINE CLASS DESIGNED TO SUPPORT MORE CONVENTIONAL UNIT. VERMIN CAN GENERATE A SHIELD THAT COUNTERACTS THE EFFECTS OF PSYCHOTRONS WITHIN A LIMITED RADIUS, PROTECTING NEARBY FRIENDLY SUBS. THIS SHIELD IS AUTOMATICALLY ACTIVATED WHEN A PSY-FIELD IS DETECTED BUT WILL TURN OFF ONCE ITS BATTERIES ARE DEPLETED. THE VERMIN CAN ALSO EMIT AN ANTI-PHANTOM FIELD THAT NULLIFIES STEALTH GENERATORS. THIS HAS THE SAME RANGE AS THE ANTI-PSYCHOTRON FIELD BUT DOES NOT REQUIRE RECHARGING (I.E. IS CONSTANTLY ACTIVE). FOR DEFENSIVE PURPOSES VERMIN CARRY ENERGY SHELLS AND HAVE MEDIUM ARMOR AND SPEED."
u"A SMALL SCOUT SUB CLASS ABLE TO SELF-TELEPORT. IT HAS UNARMED BUT IS REASONABLY FAST AND INVISIBLE TO SONAR. ITS GENERATOR MUST RECHARGE ITSELF BETWEEN TELEPORTS."
u"THIS CLASS IS SPECIFICALLY FOR COLLECTING THE BIOCAPSULES FROM DESTROYED SILICON SUBS AND RETURNING THEM TO A MOLECULAR REPAIR FACILITY FOR RENEWAL. IT IS UNARMED."
u"WS FLAGSHIP - SPECIAL SUBMARINE THAT APPEARS IN BATTLE AREAS ONLY IN CASE OF EMERGENCY TO GIVE SPECIAL COMMANDS. YOU CANNOT BUILD THIS TYPE OF SUBMARINE."
u"BO FLAGSHIP - SPECIAL SUBMARINE THAT APPEARS IN BATTLE AREAS ONLY IN CASE OF EMERGENCY TO GIVE SPECIAL COMMANDS. YOU CANNOT BUILD THIS TYPE OF SUBMARINE."
u"SI FLAGSHIP - SPECIAL SUBMARINE THAT APPEARS IN BATTLE AREAS ONLY IN CASE OF EMERGENCY TO GIVE SPECIAL COMMANDS. YOU CANNOT BUILD THIS TYPE OF SUBMARINE."

u"A LARGE CARGO CONTAINER USED TO TRANSPORT METAL AND CORIUM TO ALLIES VIA REPSUBS (FOR THE WHITE SHARKS) OR REPAIR PLATFORMS (FOR BLACK OCTOPI). ONE CONTAINER CAN STORE UP TO 10,000 UNITS OF RESOURCES. CARGO CONTAINERS ARE PRODUCED AND PROCESSED AT TRADECENTERS AND MARKETS. A CARGO CONTAINER THAT IS NOT LOADED ON A REPSUB OR REPAIR PLATFORM CAN BE CAPTURED AND USED BY ENEMIES."

u"ARTIFACT IS A WELL PROTECTED CAPSULE USED TO STORE AND TRANSPORT SPECIAL CARGOES (GENERATORS, DEVICES, SECRET INFO, AND SO ON). ARTIFACTS ARE TRANSPORTED BY REPSUBS (WS), REPAIR PLATFORM (BO), SUPPLIER (SI) AND MAY BE CAPTURED IN THE SAME WAY AS CARGO CONTAINERS."

u"THE STANDARD PROJECTILE WEAPON FOR LIGHT AND MEDIUM CLASS SUBMARINES. THEY ARE CHEAP TO PRODUCE IN BOTH WHITE SHARK ARMCENTERS AND BLACK OCTOPI MUNITIONS FACTORIES AND CARRY SUFFICIENT CHARGE TO BE EFFECTIVE AGAINST LESS ARMORED ENEMY SUBS AND STRUCTURES. THEY HAVE A MEDIUM EFFECTIVENESS IN BATTLE THAT CAN BE IMPROVED BY TECHNOLOGY UPGRADES."

u"MORE ADVANCED PROJECTILE WEAPONS, MEDIUM TORPEDOES CARRY MULTIPLE WARHEADS THAT EXPLODE IN SEQUENCE TO MORE EFFECTIVELY PENETRATE ARMOR AND DAMAGE OF THE INTERNAL STRUCTURE OF ENEMY SUBS AND STRUCTURES. MORE EXPENSIVE THAN SMALL TORPEDOES, THEY ARE ALSO PRODUCED IN ARMCENTERS AND MUNITIONS FACTORIES. MEDIUM TORPEDOES ARE ONLY USED AS STANDARD BY WHITE SHARKS, PARTICULARLY ON STATIONARY TORPEDO LAUNCHING PLATFORMS."

u"AN UPGRADED VERSION OF MEDIUM TORPEDOES, WHILE SACRIFICING SOME SPEED THIS WEAPON PACKS A MORE EFFECTIVE, POWERFUL AND CO-ORDINATED PUNCH. LARGE TORPEDOES ARE ON THE STANDARD WEAPONRY OF WHITE SHARK CRUISERS AND ARE COMPARATIVELY INEXPENSIVE TO PRODUCE IN ARMCENTERS. TECHNOLOGY UPGRADES FURTHER IMPROVE THEIR EFFECTIVENESS."

u"INSTALLED ON INVADER CLASS SUBMARINES AND MAGNETIC-MINE LAUNCHERS, CASSETTE SHELLS ARE DESIGNED TO DAMAGE GROUPS OF SMALL AND MEDIUM ENEMY SUBMARINES. AFTER FIRING EACH SHELL SPLITS INTO A NUMBER OF MODERATELY POWERFUL CHARGES IN A SPREAD TO INFLICT DAMAGE. THEY ARE EXPENSIVE TO PRODUCE (VIA MUNITIONS FACTORIES) BUT HAVE A HIGHER BATTLE EFFECTIVENESS THAN SPLINTER TORPEDOES."

u"A MEDIUM CLASS OF WEAPONS USED BY DESTROYER CLASS SUBS. WHEN A SPLINTER TORPEDO IMPACTS ON ITS TARGET IT SPLINTERS INTO MINI-WARHEADS THAT DAMAGE NEARBY OBJECTS. THE TORPEDOES ARE COMPARATIVELY INEXPENSIVE AND PRODUCED IN A MUNITIONS FACTORY."

u"A UNIQUE BLACK OCTOPI WEAPON, THESE PROJECTILES ARE USED BY ELECTRO-MAGNETIC LAUNCHER (EML) INSTALLATIONS PRIMARILY TO PROTECT BASES. BY EXPLODING TO PRODUCE AN ELECTROMAGNETIC FIELD, ENEMY OBJECTS SUFFER AN ONGOING DEGRADATION EFFECT THAT OVER TIME WILL RESULT IN THEIR DESTRUCTION IF THEY ARE NOT FULLY REPAIRED. THE WEAPON IS PARTICULARLY EFFECTIVE AGAINST SILICONS, CAUSING A DISCHARGE OF THE ENERGY ACCUMULATORS NECESSARY FOR THEIR SUB REGENERATION. THIS IS AN EXPENSIVE WEAPON TO PRODUCE VIA MUNITIONS FACTORIES AND ELECTROMAGNETIC TORPEDOES CANNOT BE FITTED ON SUBMARINES AS THEY ARE TOO SMALL TO CARRY THE INTERNAL SHIELDING REQUIRED TO STORE THEM."

u"THE BASE LEVEL OPTICAL-ENERGY WEAPON, LIGHT LASERS ARE PART OF THE STANDARD EQUIPMENT FOR MANY SUBS AND DEFENSIVE CONSTRUCTIONS. USING A SELF-RECHARGING ENERGY SYSTEM, LIGHT LASERS ARE IDEAL FOR UNITS WHICH MUST ACT WITHOUT RESUPPLY FOR LONG PERIODS OF TIME. THE DRAIN OF CONSTANT USE IN HEATED BATTLES CAN RESULT IN FIRING DELAYS DURING RECHARGE AND IT IS RECOMMENDED THAT POWER STATIONS BE BUILT, PROVIDING ENHANCED ENERGY STORAGE TO REDUCE THE TIME BETWEEN SHOTS."

u"A MORE POWERFUL OPTICAL-LIGHT LASER CARRIED AS STANDARD ON HEAVY CRUISERS. RUBY LASERS ARE MORE POWERFUL THAN LIGHT LASERS BUT STILL REQUIRE RECHARGING WHICH CAN BE SPED UP BY BUILDING POWER STATIONS."

u"A THIRD-GENERATION LASER WEAPON THAT REQUIRES EXTENSIVE COOLING AND CAN ONLY BE INSTALLED ON SPECIAL HEAVY LASER STATIONARY PLATFORMS. AGAIN, POWER STATIONS CAN BE USED TO REDUCE THE RECHARGE TIME BETWEEN SHOTS."

u"BELONGING TO THE MEDIUM CLASS OF WEAPONRY, LIGHT HF SHELLS ARE USED BY SENTINEL CLASS SUBMARINES. WITH A HIGH RATE OF FIRE AND RAPID AMMUNITION REGENERATION, THIS IS PERHAPS THE MOST EFFECTIVE WEAPON FOR SUBS OPERATING WITHOUT A SUPPLY BASE FOR EXTENDED PERIODS OF TIME."

u"HIGHLY EFFECTIVE AT PROVIDING SCREENING FIRE, THIS MORE POWERFUL VERSION OF LIGHT HF SHELLS MUST BE MOUNTED ON A HF CANNON STRUCTURE. AS THEY HAVE A HIGH REGENERATION RATE AND DO NOT REQUIRE ADDITIONAL RESOURCES THEY CAN BE IRREPLACEABLE IN BASE DEFENSE WHEN RESOURCES ARE LIMITED."

u"USING A MAGNETIC AIMING SYSTEM, THESE MINES CAN TRACK AND DESTROY MOVING ENEMY OBJECTS IN THEIR VICINITY. IF A MINE IS UNABLE TO REACH ITS TARGET BEFORE ITS ONBOARD PROPULSION SYSTEM RUNS OUT OF ENERGY THE MINE WILL INSTANTLY EXPLODE. THESE MINES ARE LAUNCHED BY MAGNETIC-MINE LAUNCHERS (MML) AND ARE EXPENSIVE AND SLOW TO PRODUCE AT MUNITIONS FACTORIES."

u"ARE USED TO CREATE BELTS OF MINES AND BLOCK BASE APPROACHES AND NARROW PASSAGES. THEY ARE CARRIED BY MINE-LAYER CLASS SUBS AND WHEN TRIGGERED THEY EXPLODE TO DAMAGE SUBS ON THE SAME AND NEARBY DEPTH LEVELS. DEPTH MINES ARE INVISIBLE TO ENEMY SUBS EXCEPT FOR MINE-LAYERS, BIOACID ASSAULTERS AND DEFENDERS WITH DM-DETECTOR TECHNOLOGY AND ARE IMMEDIATELY ARMED ON LAUNCH. NOTE THAT THEY CAN BE SET TO DIFFERENT DEPTH LEVELS AT ANY TIME AND MAY DAMAGE FRIENDLY OBJECTS WITHIN THE BLAST RANGE WHEN TRIGGERED.  DEPTH MINES ARE PRODUCED BY ARMCENTERS."

u"AN OPTICAL-LIGHT BASED MINE, THIS WEAPON IS STANDARD EQUIPMENT FOR DEFENDERS. LASER SNARES ARE MOST EFFECTIVE IN BLOCKADING NARROW PASSAGES AND TUNNELS AS THE WEAPON SIMULTANEOUSLY DAMAGES ALL ENEMY SUBS WITHIN A THREE-CELL RADIUS AT THE SAME DEPTH LEVEL. IT IS IMPORTANT TO POSITION MULTIPLE SNARES ON VARIOUS LEVELS TO EFFECTIVELY BLOCK AN AREA AND IT IS POSSIBLE TO CHANGE THEIR DEPTH LEVELS IF REQUIRED. LASER SNARES ARE INVISIBLE TO ALL ENEMY SUBS, EXCEPT MINE-LAYERS, BIOACID ASSAULTERS AND DEFENDERS CLASSES EQUIPPED WITH LS-DETECTORS. WHILE EXPENSIVE TO PRODUCE VIA MUNITIONS FACTORIES, SNARES CAN BE EXTREMELY EFFECTIVE IN THE RIGHT LOCATION."

u"THE MOST POWERFUL WEAPON FOR THE WHITE SHARKS. WARHEADS CARRYING THE CHARGE ARE DELIVERED TO THE STRIKE POINT BY THERMO-NUCLEAR ROCKETS LAUNCHED FROM A THERMO-NUCLEAR LAUNCHING SHAFT. EACH WARHEAD IS POWERFUL ENOUGH TO TOTALLY DESTROY ANY OBJECT. THE CRITICAL COMPONENTS TO CREATE WARHEADS ARE PRODUCED IN PLASMATRONS."

u"CARRIED BY DC BOMBERS, THIS WEAPON HAS BEEN DESIGNED AS A QUASI-MINE THAT DAMAGES GROUPS OF ENEMY OBJECTS FROM ABOVE. VERY EFFECTIVE AGAINST STRUCTURES, DC BOMBERS FIRE 10 DC BOMBS AT A TIME. IT IS IMPORTANT TO NOTE THAT THIS IS AN EXPENSIVE WEAPON THAT REQUIRED FREQUENT REPLENISHING FROM AN ARMCENTER."

u"A UNIQUE WEAPON OF MASS DESTRUCTION USING A SERIES OF EXTREMELY POWERFUL LASERS THAT DAMAGE STRUCTURES AND SUBS ON DEPTH LEVELS BELOW THE BOMB AS IT FALLS. WHILE THE LASERS RAPIDLY BURN OUT THEY ARE CAPABLE OF DESTROYING ANY ENEMY OBJECTS WITHIN FIVE TO EIGHT CELLS OF THE LASER BOMB DEPENDING ON THE LANDSCAPE. THE WEAPON IS VERY EXPENSIVE TO PRODUCE AND ALSO REQUIRES THE CONSTRUCTION OF A LASER BOMB LAUNCHER FOR CONTROL PURPOSES."

u"THE MOST POWERFUL SUB-BASED WEAPON AND UNIQUE TO THE WHITE SHARKS. BULKY PLASMA GENERATORS ARE REQUIRED TO DELIVER THE CHARGES AND CAN ONLY BE INSTALLED ON TERMINATOR CLASS SUBMARINES AND STATIONARY PLASMA CANNONS. WHILE PLASMA GENERATORS ARE VERY EXPENSIVE TO PRODUCE THEY DO NOT REQUIRE EXTERNAL POWER SOURCES. THEIR RATE OF FIRE IS LOWER THAN OTHER WEAPONS INSTALLED ON SUBS OR STRUCTURES."

u"A LIGHT WEAPON USED BY SILICON SHS AND USURPER CLASS SUBMARINES. WHILE EACH SHOT IS COMPARATIVELY LOWLY POWERED THE FIRE RATE IS VERY HIGH AND NO EXTERNAL AMMUNITION OR ENERGY SOURCE IS REQUIRED. ENERGY SHELLS CAN BE UPGRADED TO BECOME ONE OF THE MOST EFFECTIVE WEAPONS IN THE SILICON ARSENAL."

u"AN ENERGY WEAPON USING IONIC CHARGES TO ASSAULT SMALL GROUPS OF ENEMY OBJECTS. A STANDARD WEAPON FOR ESCORT CLASS SUBMARINES, ION CASSETTE SHELLS DO NOT REQUIRE EXTERNAL AMMUNITION AND POSSESS A REASONABLY HIGH RATE OF FIRE. AS THEIR BLAST AREA IS UNCONTROLLED, CARE MUST BE TAKEN TO AVOID DAMAGING FRIENDLY OBJECTS."

u"DESIGNED FOR USE IN DOUBLE PLASMA TURRET (DPT) GUNS THIS WEAPON DOES NOT REQUIRE AMMUNITION AND HAS A MEDIUM DESTRUCTIVE POWER. THE RATE OF FIRE FOR DTP GUNS IS SOMEWHAT LOWER THAN OTHER DEFENSIVE STRUCTURES USING ENERGY-CHARGES."

u"UNLIKE COMMON ENERGY SHELLS, PLASMA SHELLS ARE MORE POWERFUL AND INTENDED MAINLY TO PROVIDE BARRAGE FIRE TO PROTECT UNDERWATER COLONIES. THE WEAPON IS FITTED TO STATIONARY PP PULSARS HAVING A HIGH RATE OF FIRE AND NO REQUIREMENT FOR AMMUNITION."

u"AN ENERGY WEAPON MOUNTED ON PARCHERS, SELF-GUIDED ENERGY SHELLS USE INFRARED AIMING TO MAKE THE WEAPON HIGHLY ACCURATE IN HITTING FAST MOVING TARGETS. PARCHERS DO NOT REQUIRE AMMUNITION BUT HAVE A SLOW REGENERATION RATE."

u"DESIGNED TO CREATE EXPLOSIVE MINE BELTS, ACOUSTIC MINES CAN BE SET TO REACT TO SPECIFIC ENEMY SUB CLASSES TO ENSURE THE MOST DANGEROUS ENEMY UNITS ARE TARGETED FIRST. ACOUSTIC MINES ARE PRODUCED IN ARSENALS AND TRANSPORTED AND LAID BY BIOACID ASSAULTERS. THE MINES ARE INVISIBLE TO ALL CLASSES OF ENEMY SUBS."

u"A FORM OF BIOACID WEAPON, THESE MINES ARE LAID IN A PERIMETER BY A BIO-MINE LAUNCHER WHICH WILL REPLACE EACH AS THEY ARE DESTROYED. BIO-MINES ARE SLOW MOVING, BUT EFFECTIVE IN PROTECTING UNDERWATER COLONIES. THE MINES ARE PRODUCED IN ARSENALS."

u"INTENDED TO PROTECT SILICON COLONIES OR NARROW PASSAGES FROM ENEMY SUBS. JUMP-MINES ARE MOUNTED ON JUMP-MINE LAUNCHERS WHICH AUTOMATICALLY MAINTAIN A PERIMETER OF MINES, REPLACING EACH JUMP-MINE AS THEY ARE DESTROYED. THESE MINES MOVE QUITE SLOWLY AND RELY HEAVILY ON TERRAIN FEATURES FOR THEIR MAXIMUM SPEED AND THUS CAN BE INEFFECTIVE IN CERTAIN ENVIRONMENTS AND AGAINST RAPIDLY MOVING ENEMY SUBS. JUMP-MINES ARE COMPARABLY INEXPENSIVE AND ARE PRODUCED IN ARSENALS."

u"A BALLISTIC WEAPON DESIGNED TO DAMAGE HARD TO REACH ENEMY OBJECTS, BHE SHELLS GENERATE AN IONIC-POSITRON FIELD AS THEY FALL TOWARDS THEIR TARGET. THIS FIELD DAMAGES OBJECTS ON DIFFERENT LEVELS AND ACTUALLY DOES MORE DAMAGE TOWARDS THE PERIPHERY OF THE FIELD'S RANGE RATHER THAN IN THE TARGETED CENTER. THIS WEAPON IS CARRIED BY DREADNOUGHTS AND IS GENERALLY LESS EFFECTIVE AGAINST MOVING OBJECTS THAT CAN EXIT THE FIELD RADIUS. SHELLS ARE QUITE EXPENSIVE AND PRODUCED IN ARSENALS."

u"A SPECIFIC PROJECTILE WEAPON DESIGNED FOR USE ON PARALYSIS PROBE CLASS SUBMARINES. THE SHELLS EXPLODE ON IMPACT, BREACHING ARMOR SUFFICIENTLY TO ALLOW A NEURO-PARALYSIS GAS TO PENETRATE. DURING THE EFFECTIVE PERIOD FOR THE GAS THE OBJECT IS IMMOBILIZED AND CANNOT FIRE, MAKING SUBS IN PARTICULAR EASY TARGETS FOR DESTRUCTION OR CAPTURE.  NEURO-SHELLS ARE QUITE EXPENSIVE AND HAVE A BRIEF EFFECTIVE DURATION. THEY ARE SUPPLIED BY ARSENALS AND ARE REQUIRED FOR THE CAPTURE AND USE OF ENEMY SUBMARINE HULLS."

u"THE STANDARD WEAPON FOR BIOACID ASSAULTERS, IT DAMAGES ENEMY OBJECTS WITH A POWERFUL CHARGE TO BREACH ARMOR FOLLOWED BY MOLECULAR ACID TO DESTROY DELICATE INTERNAL COMPONENTS. PRODUCED IN ARSENALS, THEY ARE THE MOST COST/EFFECTIVE TORPEDO WEAPON."

u"A MEDIUM CLASS OF WEAPONS USED AS STANDARD BY GAS SHELL LAUNCHERS. GAS SHELLS ARE COMPARATIVELY INEXPENSIVE AND PRODUCED IN ARSENALS. THE LAUNCHER IS ABLE TO TARGET ENEMIES AT DIFFERENT DEPTH LEVELS."

u"THE MOST POWERFUL SILICON WEAPON, VACUUM BOMBS ARE LESS POWERFUL THAN THE WHITE SHARKS' NUKE, BUT AS POWERFUL AS THE BLACK OCTOPI LASER BOMB. DESIGNED AS A TACTICAL WEAPON, VACUUM BOMBS ARE EXPENSIVE TO BUILD AND MUST BE LAUNCHED BY A VB LAUNCHER."

u"A FIELD WEAPON UTILIZING ULTRASONIC WAVES, THE ULTRASONIC FIELD IS ABLE TO BE CONTINUOUSLY MAINTAINED WITHOUT AMMUNITION. THIS FIELD IS GENERATED BY AN ULTRASONIC GENERATOR AND IGNORES THE ARMOR OF AN OBJECT IN DOING DAMAGE. MULTIPLE GENERATORS CAN BE CONSTRUCTED TO OVERLAP FIELDS AND INCREASE THE DESTRUCTIVE EFFECTIVENESS. ONLY THE SPECIAL ANTIULTRASONIC SCREEN TECHNOLOGY UPGRADE PROVIDES PROTECTION FROM THE FIELD."

u"A UNIQUE PARALYZING WEAPON THAT IMMOBILIZES SUBMARINES UNTIL FULLY REPAIRED. NOTE THAT FOR THE WHITE SHARKS AND BLACK OCTOPI THIS REQUIRES THE USE OF SOME FORM OF MOBILE REPAIR PLATFORM HOWEVER SILICON SUBS REVIVE DUE TO NATURAL REGENERATION TO 100% LIFE. CARRIED BY AVENGERS, PARALYZING RAYS DO NOT REQUIRE AMMUNITION AND SLOWLY REGENERATE THEIR POWER."

u"A FIELD WEAPON UTILIZING HIGH POWER SOLITON WAVES TO GENERATE A CONSTANTLY REGENERATING FIELD WITHOUT ANY REQUIREMENT FOR AMMUNITION. . SOLITON OSCILLATORS HAVE GREATER POWER THAT ULTRASONIC GENERATORS AND ARE ABLE TO REGULATE THE RANGE AND, CORRESPONDINGLY, THE DAMAGE THEY INFLICT. THEY CAN OVERLAP FIELDS FOR INCREASED EFFECTIVENESS AND IGNORE ENEMY ARMOR LEVELS IN INFLICTING DAMAGE. SOLITON OSCILLATORS ARE EXPENSIVE TO CONSTRUCT."

u"ANALOGOUS TO THE LASERS OF THE BLACK OCTOPI, THIS WHITE SHARK WEAPON IS THE MOST POWERFUL OPTICAL BEAM DEVELOPED TO-DATE. THE LASER IS HOUSED ON A SATELLITE IN NEAR-EARTH ORBIT THAT IS LAUNCHED AND CONTROLLED BY THE GAS LASER SATELLITE (GLS) LAUNCHER.  THE SG LASER IS EFFECTIVE AT ACCURATE STRATEGIC STRIKES AT ENEMY OBJECTS HOWEVER REQUIRES A GREAT DEAL OF TIME BETWEEN RECHARGE. THE SATELLITE IS LOST IF THE LAUNCHER IS DESTROYED."

u"AN ARTILLERY SUBMARINE, DC BOMBERS HAVE BEEN SPECIALLY DEVELOPED TO ASSAULT GROUPS OF ENEMY SUBS OR STRUCTURES. THESE SUBS ARE ALSO EFFECTIVE AGAINST ENEMY DEFENSIVE STRUCTURES. THEY HAVE GOOD ARMOR AND CARRY SMALL TORPEDOES TO DEFEND THEMSELVES AGAINST SMALL SUBS BUT ARE SLOW MOVING AND REQUIRE ANTI-SUB SUPPORT IN MOST BATTLES."

u"DESIGNED SPECIFICALLY FOR LAYING AND CLEARING MINEFIELDS. MINE-LAYERS ARE ARMED WITH 10 DEPTH MINES AND SMALL TORPEDOES AS A BACK-UP. WHILE NOT DESIGNED FOR COMBAT WITH OTHER SUBS THEY HAVE A LIMITED ABILITY TO DEFEND THEMSELVES AGAINST MEDIUM ENEMY SUBMARINES BUT DO NOT POSSESS THE ARMOR FOR LONG ENGAGEMENTS."

u"MORE LIKE A GLOATING STRUCTURE THAN A SUBMARINE, THESE PLATFORMS ARE DESIGNED TO REPAIR DAMAGED SUBMARINES AND DOUBLE AS A TRANSPORT FOR PARALYZED UNITS. REPSUBS ARE ALSO ABLE TO TRANSPORT LARGE CARGOES INCLUDING ARTIFACTS AND CONTAINERS BUT DO NOT POSSESS ANY ARMOR OR WEAPONS."

u"A UNIQUE HYBRID CYBER-ORGANISM DESIGNED TO PENETRATE ENEMY SILOS AND CORIUM SILOS AND STEAL SOME OF THE RESOURCES BY TELEPORTING THEM TO A FRIENDLY DEPOT. WHILE THEY POSSESS DECENT SPEED AND MANEUVERABILITY THEY ARE UNARMED AND UNARMORED. CYBERWORM PRODUCTION IS SLOW AND THE UNIT CANNOT BE REPAIRED."

u"THE MOST POWERFUL WHITE SHARK SUB CLASS. ARMED WITH A PLASMA GENERATOR THESE SUBMARINES CAN SINK A BLACK OCTOPI DESTROYER WITH A SINGLE SHOT. WHILE ALSO EQUIPPED WITH A RELATIVELY HIGH SPEED FOR THIS SIZE OF SUB THEY SUFFER FROM LIMITED ARMOR AND A SLOW RATE OF FIRE."

u"AN ANTI-STEALTH SUBMARINE, LIBERATORS CAN DETECT ENEMY PHANTOMS AND STEALTH SCOUTS TO TURN THEM INTO EASIER TARGETS. LIBERATORS ARE ARMED WITH SMALL TORPEDOES AND 10 BEACONS, AUTONOMOUS 'MINES' WHICH HAVE THE SAME ABILITY TO CANCEL ENEMY STEALTH TECHNOLOGY WITHIN A RADIUS BUT FOR A SHORTER PERIOD OF TIME DUE TO THEIR LIMITED ENERGY SUPPLY."
u"LIGHTLY ARMORED AND WITHOUT ANY WEAPONS THIS SUBMARINE IS DESIGNED TO BUILD ALL TYPES OF STRUCTURES."
u"TRANSPORTS RESOURCES FROM MINES TO A DEPOT. WHILE IT HAS MEDIUM SPEED IT IS UNARMED AND UNARMORED."

u"THIS SUB CLASS CAN CAPTURE ENEMY OBJECTS IN ORDER TO USE THEM AGAINST THEIR FORMER OWNER. AFTER A SUCCESSFUL CAPTURE THE PLAYER'S TECHCENTER GETS TEMPORARY ACCESS TO RELEVANT TECHNOLOGIES POSSESSED BY THE PREVIOUS OWNER OF THE CAPTURED STRUCTURE OR SUB. THESE APPEAR IN A SECTION OF AVAILABLE RESEARCH CALLED ENEMY TECHNOLOGIES. NOTE THAT SILICON TECHNOLOGIES CANNOT BE LEARNT. MARAUDERS HAVE DECENT ARMOR AND ARE ARMED WITH SMALL TORPEDOES."

u"THE SMALLEST COMBAT SUBMARINE AVAILABLE TO THE BLACK OCTOPI, THE FIGHTER IS MANEUVERABLE AND QUITE FAST BUT SUFFERS FROM LIMITED ARMOR PROTECTION. IT IS A GOOD PATROL SUB AND CAN BE USED TO SWARM THE ENEMY WHILST LARGER SUBS DO THE REAL DAMAGE. IT REQUIRES AMMUNITION REPLENISHMENT FROM A MUNITIONS FACTORY."

u"ANOTHER MEDIUM CLASS SUBMARINE ARMED WITH SPLINTER TORPEDOES. DESTROYERS HAVE GOOD SPEED AND REASONABLE ARMOR AND ARE WELL-EQUIPPED TO FIGHT GROUPS OF MEDIUM AND SMALL ENEMY SUBS. SPLINTER TORPEDOES ARE MADE IN A MUNITIONS FACTORY."

u"THIS SUBMARINE CLASS HAS HEAVY ARMOR AND A POWERFUL RUBY LASER BATTERY. INTENDED MAINLY TO ASSAULT ENEMY DEFENSES AND SUBMARINES, IT LACKS SPEED BUT PACKS A LARGE PUNCH. HEAVY CRUISERS SUFFER FROM A SLOW RATE OF FIRE AND ARE BEST USED WITH SUPPORTING PACKS OF SMALLER SUBMARINES."

u"INTENDED TO ASSAULT GROUPS OF ENEMY OBJECTS, THE INVADER CLASS IS AN ARTILLERY SUBMARINE EQUIPPED WITH CASSETTE SHELLS WHICH AFFECT AN AREA RATHER THAN SPECIFIC TARGET. WHILE WELL ARMORED AND WITH GOOD SPEED, THESE SUBS ARE VERY EXPENSIVE TO PRODUCE AND REPAIR. CASSETTE SHELLS ARE MADE IN A MUNITIONS FACTORY."

u"A MEDIUM CLASS SUBMARINE, THE DEFENDER IS PRIMARILY DESIGNED TO ESTABLISH ANT-SUBMARINE BELTS OF LASER SNARES. IT CAN CARRY UP TO 10 SNARES AT ONCE. ALSO ARMED WITH SMALL TORPEDOES, DEFENDERS HAVE AN OFFENSIVE ADVANTAGE OVER INDIVIDUAL SMALL SUBS BUT ARE OUTCLASSED BY LARGER ONES."

u"USED TO REPAIR DAMAGED SUBMARINES AND TRANSPORT THEM AWAY FROM A COMBAT IF REQUIRED DUE TO PARALYSIS. REPAIR PLATFORMS ARE ALSO USED TO TRANSPORT LARGE CARGOES SUCH AS RESOURCE CONTAINERS AND ARTIFACTS. THESE SUBMARINES ARE UNARMED AND UNARMORED."

u"THIS MEDIUM CLASS OF SUBMARINES HAS GOOD SPEED AND IS ARMED WITH RUBY LASERS. IT CAN ENTER AN 'INVISIBLE' STEALTH MODE FOR A PERIOD OF TIME AND THEN MUST RECHARGE. IT IS QUITE EXPENSIVE BUT VERSATILE AND CAN HOLD ITS OWN AGAINST SIMILAR SIZED SUBS EVEN WHEN VISIBLE."

u"A SPECIALLY BRED HYBRID CREATURE, CYBERDOLPHINS CARRY A POWERFUL CHARGE THAT CAN DESTROY A MEDIUM CLASS SUBMARINE OR SERIOUSLY DAMAGE A HEAVY ONE. THEIR HIGH SPEED AND MANEUVERABILITY MAKE CYBERDOLPHINS INVULNERABLE IN FIGHT AND THE UNIT IS IDEAL FOR ATTACKING TARGETS IN HARD-TO-REACH AREAS. CYBERDOLPHINS CANNOT BE REPAIRED AND ARE SLOW TO PRODUCE (TRAIN)."

u"IN ADDITION TO STANDARD WEAPONS THIS SUB CLASS IS ARMED WITH A PARALYZING RAYS GENERATOR. THIS WEAPON CAN INSTANTLY DISABLE ANY SUBMARINE WITHOUT DAMAGING IT. DISABLED SUBS CANNOT MOVE OR FIRE AND MUST BE REPAIRED TO REGAIN THESE ABILITIES. AVENGERS ARE ALSO ARMED WITH A LIGHT LASER AND HAVE MEDIUM ARMOR."
u"SUBMARINE POSSESSING LIGHT ARMOR AND NO WEAPONS THAT IS DESIGNED TO BUILD STRUCTURES."

u"THIS CLASS OF SUBMARINE HAS THE UNIQUE ABILITY TO CAPTURE ENEMY OBJECTS. ONCE CAPTURED THEY CAN BE USED AGAINST THEIR FORMER OWNER. AFTER THE SUCCESSFUL CAPTURE OF CERTAIN WHITE SHARK STRUCTURES THE PLAYER'S RESLAB WILL GAIN TEMPORARY ACCESS TO SPECIFIC ENEMY TECHNOLOGIES. THEY APPEAR UNDER THE CATEGORY ENEMY TECHNOLOGIES AND CAN BE RESEARCHED TO GAIN CERTAIN STRUCTURES AND SUBS USED BY THE WHITE SHARKS. SILICON TECHNOLOGY CANNOT BE CAPTURED AND USED. RAIDERS HAVE GOOD ARMOR AND ARE ARMED WITH A LIGHT LASER."
u"REQUIRED TO TRANSPORT RESOURCES FROM MINES TO SILOS. WHILE IT HAS MEDIUM SPEED IT IS UNARMED AND UNARMORED."

u"A SMALL PROBE SUBMARINE DESIGNED FOR RECONNOITERING ENEMY TERRITORY. THEY ARE EQUIPPED WITH STEALTH GENERATORS TO MAKE THE SUB INVISIBLE TO ENEMIES UNLESS A LIBERATOR SUB OR DISPERSER OR BIO-SONAR STRUCTURE IS NEARBY AND THE ENEMY HAS RESEARCHED ANTI-STEALTH DISPERSER TECHNOLOGY."

u"THE MOST BASIC UNIT FOR THE SILICONS USED TO BUILD ALL OTHER SILICON STRUCTURES (EXCEPT CHUB MODULES). CAPSULE-PROTOTYPES ARE PRODUCED VERY QUICKLY IN PROTOPLASM GENERATORS HOWEVER ARE ONE-USE ITEMS THAT DO NOT POSSESS ANY ARMOR OR WEAPONRY."
u"TRANSPORTS CORIUM FROM COLLECTORS TO SILOS FOR PROCESSING."

u"A TRANSPORT FOR SLOW MOVING UNITS AND LARGE OBJECTS. IT IS THE SOLE MEANS OF COLLECTING PARALYZED ENEMY SUBS AND METAL WRECKAGE FOR DELIVERY TO RECYCLOTRONS. SUPPLIERS GAIN THE ABILITY TO TELEPORT AFTER RESEARCH OF THE APPROPRIATE TECHNOLOGY AND CAN THEN USE THIS ABILITY TO TRANSPORT SINGLE SILICON SUBS TO ANY AREA ON THE MAP EXCEPT FOR ZONES PROTECTED BY TELESHIELDS."

u"THIS SUB PARALYZES ENEMY SUBS WITH NEURO-SHELLS. PARALYSIS LASTS FOR A LIMITED PERIOD TIME DURING WHICH THE AFFECTED OBJECT CANNOT PERFORM ANY ACTIONS. NEURO-SHELLS ALSO INFLICT DAMAGE AS LIGHT WEAPONS. PROBES HAVE WEAK ARMOR BUT GOOD SPEED. NOTE THAT NEURO-SHELLS ARE EXPENSIVE AND MUST BE PRODUCED IN AN ARSENAL."

u"EFFECTIVELY A MOBILE REPLENISH POD, THESE SUBS ARE DESIGNED TO SUPPLY OTHER SUBS WITH ENERGY WHILE AWAY FROM BASE. THEY HAVE A LIMITED EFFECTIVE RANGE HOWEVER ONE REPLENISHER IS ABLE TO SUPPLY THE REQUIRED ENERGY TO A GROUP OF SUBS. THE UNIT IS ALSO ABLE TO CONVERT FRIENDLY STRUCTURES INTO CORIUM AND SILICON WHEN RESOURCES ARE SHORT WITH 60% OF THE STRUCTURE'S INITIAL COST BECOMING AVAILABLE. REPLENISHERS ARE POORLY ARMORED AND UNARMED."
u"THE BASIC MILITARY SUBMARINE FOR THE SILICONS, SHS SUBS ARE FAST AND DO NOT REQUIRE OUTSIDE AMMUNITION PROVISION. WHILE POORLY ARMORED IT IS FAST AND INEXPENSIVE TO BUILD."

u"A LARGE SUB EFFECTIVE FOR ASSAULTING DEFENSIVE STRUCTURES AND GROUPS OF SUBS. IT IS ARMED WITH BALLISTIC ARTILLERY-STYLE SHELLS FOR INFLICTING DAMAGE FROM ABOVE AT ALL DEPTH LEVELS AND IS PARTICULARLY GOOD FOR TARGETING HARD TO REACH AREAS. DREADNOUGHTS ARE EXPENSIVE, CONSUME A GREAT DEAL OF ENERGY AND REQUIRE AN ARSENAL FOR REARMING. THEY ARE QUITE SLOW BUT ARE WELL ARMORED."

u"MEDIUM CLASS SUBMARINE ARMED WITH ION CASSETTE SHELLS FOR ASSAULTING SMALL GROUPS OF ENEMY SUBS. ESCORTS DO NOT REQUIRE EXTERNAL AMMUNITION, AND ARE RELATIVELY FAST WITH MEDIUM ARMOR. THEY ARE COMPARATIVELY EXPENSIVE TO PRODUCTION."

u"A HEAVY SUBMARINE ARMED WITH ACID SHELLS, THIS CLASS CAN BE EVEN MORE DANGEROUS WHEN DESTROYED AS THE ASSAULTER EXPLODES CAUSING ACID DAMAGE TO OTHER SUBS WITHIN THREE CELLS OF THE EXPLOSION. BIOACID ASSAULTERS ALSO CARRY ACOUSTIC MINES THAT CAN BE LAID AND SET TO REACT TO SPECIFIC WEIGHT CLASSES OF ENEMY SUBS, THUS EXPLODING ONLY WHEN AN APPROPRIATE TARGET APPROACHES. THE SUB HAS GOOD ARMOR BUT IS VERY EXPENSIVE TO PRODUCE AND OPERATE. THE CLASS MUST HAVE BOTH ACOUSTIC MINES AND ACID SHELLS SUPPLIED BY AN ARSENAL."

u"DESIGNED TO CAPTURE ENEMY SUBMARINES AND STRUCTURES. IT IS ARMED WITH ENERGY SHELLS WHICH DO NOT REQUIRE EXTERNAL REPLENISHING AND HAS GOOD ARMOR AND SPEED.. AFTER A USURPER CAPTURES AN ENEMY OBJECT IT BECOMES USABLE BY THE PLAYER. NOTE THAT AS CERTAIN ENEMY UNITS AND DEFENSIVE STRUCTURES REQUIRE RESUPPLY THEY MAY NOT BE USABLE ONCE THEIR AMMUNITION HAS BEEN EXPENDED."
u"USED TO BUILD ALL SUBS. THE SHARKS ARMOR THEIR SUBCENTERS AT THE COST OF SLIGHTLY REDUCED CONSTRUCTION SPEED."
u"THE STRUCTURE USED BY THE WHITE SHARKS TO REPAIR DAMAGED SUBS. AGAIN THIS HAS BEEN ARMOR AT THE EXPENSE OF REPAIR SPEED."

u"WHILE NEW TECHNOLOGY IS NOT A FOCUS FOR THE WHITE SHARKS, THEY DO PERFORM MILITARY RESEARCH IN THIS CENTER. AS THE SCIENCES ARE UNDERFUNDED THEIR SPEED OF ACQUIRING NEW TECHNOLOGY IS SOMEWHAT SLOWER THAN THAT OF THE BLACK OCTOPI."

u"REQUIRED TO SUPPLY TORPEDOES, MINES AND DEPTH CHARGES TO RESUPPLY VARIOUS MILITARY SUBS. THE CENTER IS LIGHTLY ARMORED BUT THIS DOESN’T AFFECT THE RATE OF MANUFACTURE OF THE MOSTLY LOW TECHNOLOGY AMMUNITION."

u"THE CENTRAL INFORMATION FACILITY FOR A WHITE SHARKS BASE, THIS STRUCTURE IS USED FOR EVALUATING ENEMY STRATEGIES AND COMPARATIVE STRENGTHS AND WEAKNESSES, ALLOWING WHITE SHARKS COMMANDERS THE ABILITY TO LOOK AT THE STATUS OF ENEMY OBJECTS WHILE IN COMBAT. INFOCENTER WILL DETECT ENEMY LASER BOMB LAUNCHES AND BY INFLUENCING THEIR NAVIGATION SYSTEM REDUCE THEIR ACCURACY."
u"SPECIALST BIO-DEVELOPMENT CENTER USED BY THE WHITE SHARKS TO DEVELOP THEIR CYBERWORMS."
u"USED BY THE WHITE SHARKS TO VIEW THEIR SURROUNDINGS UNDER THE SEA. WITHOUT SONAR VISIBILITY IS LIMITED TO SIGHT RANGE, NOT FAR IN THE MURKY AND DARK DEPTHS OF THE SEA."
u"WITH SEVERAL MEDIUM TORPEDO LAUNCHERS THIS DEFENDER IS EQUIPPED TO DEAL WITH EVEN THE LARGEST ATTACKERS."
u"WITH A POWERFUL HF CANNON AND 360 DEGREE ROTATION, THIS IS AN EXTREMELY EFFECTIVE DEFENSIVE WEAPON WHEN PROVIDED WITH A CLEAR LINE OF FIRE."
u"A DEFENSIVE INSTALLATION THAT GENERATES EXTREMELY POWERFUL ULTRASONIC WAVES TO DAMAGE ENEMY OBJECTS."
u"THE MOST POWERFUL DEFENSIVE WEAPON FOR THE WHITE SHARKS. IT DOES NOT REQUIRE ARMCENTER SUPPORT BUT HAS A LOW RATE OF FIRE. "
u"USED TO COLLECT CORIUM FROM COMET FRAGMENTS ON THE SEABED."
u"THE FACILITY USED TO DESTRUCTIVELY STRIP MINE METAL FROM THE SEABED."
u"EXTRACTS THE MINUTE AMOUNTS OF GOLD FROM SEAWATER. IT IS BASED ON OLD TECHNOLOGY AND IS LESS EFFICIENT THAN THE COMPARATIVE BLACK OCTOPI STRUCTURE."
u"STORAGE DEPOT FOR RESOURCES COLLECTED BY THE WHITE SHARKS."
u"EXTRACTS OXYGEN FROM SEAWATER AND SUPPLIES ALL WHITE SHARKS STRUCTURES WITH A BREATHABLE ATMOSPHERE. THE WHITE SHARKS ARMOR THESE FACILITIES FOR SECURITY BUT LOSE SOME FUNCTIONALITY."

u"ALLOWS THE TRADE OF RESOURCES WITH SURFACE SURVIVORS. WITH A TRADECENTER THE WHITE SHARKS CAN BUY AND SELL RESOURCES IN ORDER TO GET THE ONES THEY NEED MOST. BESIDES THE TRADE FUNCTION A TRADECENTER CAN PRODUCE OR ‘USE’ CARGO CONTAINERS THAT ARE REQUIRED TO TRANSFER RESOURCES BETWEEN ALLIES."
u"PROTECTS SUBMARINES FROM ENEMY SONAR AND DISABLES THE STEALTH GENERATORS USED BY SOME BLACK OCTOPI SUBS."

u"BASED ON TECHNOLOGY STOLEN FROM THE BLACK OCTOPI SEVERAL DECADES AGO, AFTER SOME ADDITIONAL RESEARCH THE WHITE SHARKS CAN BUILD AND USE THESE CENTERS TO INSTANTLY TRANSPORT SUBS BETWEEN LOCATIONS WITHIN A LIMITED AREA."
u"USED TO DISORIENTATE ENEMY SUBS, MAKING THEM ATTACK THE NEAREST OBJECTS, EVEN FRIENDLY ONES. EFFECTIVE AGAINST LARGE GROUPS OF ENEMY SUBMARINES."
u"REQUIRED TO EXTRACT DEUTERIUM FOR NUCLEAR TORPEDOES LAUNCHED BY THE TLS."
u"NUCLEAR WEAPONS ARE THE PINNACLE OF OFFENSIVE WEAPONRY USED BY THE WHITE SHARKS, AND THIS SHAFT IS EQUIPPED TO LAUNCH TORPEDOES WITH DEUTERIUM ENRICHED NUCLEAR WARHEADS."
u"THIS IS A SPECIAL STRUCTURE THAT CREATES A TELEPORT-FREE ZONE TO PREVENT ENEMY SUBS FROM PENETRATING. IT IS EFFECTIVE AT KEEPING OUT ENEMY RAIDERS AND USURPERS BUT ONLY PROTECTS A LIMITED AREA."

u"CONTROLS THE BEHAVIOR OF UP TO THREE SHARKS SIMULTANEOUSLY. SHARKS ARE USED TO PROTECT YOUR OBJECTS FROM CYBER-CREATURE ATTACKS (DOLPHINS AND WORMS). WHEN THE NUMBER OF SHARKS CONTROLLED IS LESS THAN THREE, THE SHARK CONTROL GENERATES SPECIAL IMPULSES TO ATTRACT NEW SHARKS TO THE AREA."

u"USED TO BUILD ALL SUBS. WHILE UNARMORED THIS FACILITY IS SLIGHTLY FASTER THAN ITS WHITE SHARKS COUNTERPART – THOUGH THE HIGH COST OF MANY TECHNOLOGICALLY ADVANCED BLACK OCTOPI SUBS OFTEN MEAN SLOWER CONSTRUCTION OVERALL."
u"A CONVERSION FROM A CIVILIAN FACILITY, THIS REPAIR DOCK IS UNARMORED BUT ALLOWS QUITE RAPID REPAIRS."

u"ONE OF THE MOST PRESTIGIOUS AREAS FOR THE BLACK OCTOPI, THEIR RESEARCH LABORATORIES ARE WELL EQUIPPED AND SUPPORTED IN ORDER TO DEVELOP ADVANCED TOOLS AND TECHNOLOGY THAT IS ALSO ENVIRONMENTALLY-FRIENDLY."

u"A COMBINATION LIBRARY/INTELLIGENCE SYSTEM ADAPTED FOR MILITARY USE, THE BLACK OCTOPI CENTRAL COMPUTER ALLOWS COMMANDERS TO VIEW ACCURATE ENEMY STRUCTURE AND UNIT INFORMATION DURING COMBAT. AS IT IS ALSO USED TO STORE ENTERTAINMENT, FINANCIAL AND OTHER INFORMATION IT IS NOT ALWAYS AS EFFECTIVE AS THE WHITE SHARKS EQUIVALENT."

u"THIS FACTORY HAS BEEN DEVELOPED TO SUPPLY THE GROWING NEEDS OF THE MILITARY FOR AMMUNITION SUCH AS CASSETTE SHELLS AND TORPEDOES. AS THE BLACK OCTOPI ARE NOT WELL VERSED IN THIS DEVELOPMENT THIS FACILITY IS SLOWER THAN ITS WHITE SHARKS COUNTERPART."
u"USED BY THE BLACK OCTOPI TO VIEW THEIR SURROUNDINGS UNDER THE SEA. DESPITE THE ADVANCED NATURE OF THIS FACILITY THE BLACK OCTOPI HAVE RESURRECTED THE ORIGINAL NAME FOR THIS (SONAR) TECHNOLOGY."
u"REQUIRED TO RECHARGE BLACK OCTOPI SUBMARINES DUE TO THEIR HIGH ENERGY USAGE."
u"WHILE A RELATIVELY WEAK WEAPON, THE 360 DEGREE TURRET AND LONG RANGE OF THIS STRUCTURE ALLOWS THE BLACK OCTOPI A FIRST STRIKE ON MOST APPROACHING ENEMIES."
u"A BANK OF LASERS DESIGNED TO FUNCTION IN TANDEM FOR RAPID-FIRE, THE HEAVY GAS LASER IS AN EFFECTIVE MEDIUM RANGE DEFENSIVE STRUCTURE."
u"IS A STRONG DEFENSIVE STRUCTURE INTENDED FOR PROTECTION AGAINST LARGE GROUPS OF ENEMY SUBMARINES."
u"DESIGNED TO DESTROY ADVANCED ELECTRONICS SYSTEMS IN ENEMY SUBS AND STRUCTURES USING AN ELECTRO-MAGNETIC PULSE."

u"USED TO COLLECT CORIUM FROM COMET FRAGMENTS ON THE SEABED. AS THE BLACK OCTOPI USE AS MANY ENVIRONMENTALLY NEUTRAL TECHNIQUES AS POSSIBLE THIS FACILITY IS NOT AS FAST AS THE WHITE SHARKS EQUIVALENT."
u"EXTRACTS MINE FROM THE SEABED. AS THE BLACK OCTOPI USE AS MANY ENVIRONMENTALLY NEUTRAL TECHNIQUES AS POSSIBLE THIS FACILITY IS NOT AS FAST AS THE WHITE SHARKS EQUIVALENT."
u"EXTRACTS MINUTE AMOUNTS OF GOLD FROM SEAWATER. BASED ON MODERN TECHNOLOGY THIS PLANT IS MORE EFFECTIVE THAT THE COMPARATIVE WHITE SHARKS STRUCTURE."
u"USED FOR RESOURCE STORAGE, THIS STRUCTURE IS UNARMORED."
u"EXTRACTS OXYGEN FROM SEAWATER USING ADVANCED TECHNOLOGY. IT IS MORE EFFECTIVE THAN THE WHITE SHARKS EQUIVALENT."

u"ALLOWS THE TRADE OF RESOURCES WITH THE SURVIVING SURFACE DWELLING HUMANS. WITH A MARKET THE BLACK OCTOPI CAN BUY AND SELL RESOURCES IN ORDER TO GET THE ONES THEY NEED MOST. BESIDES THE TRADE FUNCTION A MARKET CAN PRODUCE OR ‘USE’ CARGO CONTAINERS THAT ARE NEEDED TO TRANSFER RESOURCES BETWEEN ALLIES."

u"WHILE CONCEPTUALLY DEVELOPED BEFORE THE COMET STRIKE BUT REQUIRING ADDITIONAL TECHNOLOGICAL EXPENDITURE TO BECOME WORKABLE, THE TELEPORT ALLOWS THE BLACK OCTOPI TO ALMOST INSTANTANEOUSLY MOVE UNITS ACROSS LARGE AREAS."
u"GENERATES A PROTECTIVE SHIELD AROUND FRIENDLY SUBMARINES WITHIN A CERTAIN RANGE OF THE STRUCTURE."

u"PROTECTS A LIMITED AREA FROM PENETRATION BY ENEMY SUBMARINES AND PROJECTILE WEAPONS (TORPEDOES AND SHELLS). THE PROTECTIVE FIELD DISAPPEARS AFTER BEING STRUCK BY 20 LARGE TORPEDOES. IT WILL REGENERATE1% EACH 5 SECONDS."
u"FIRES POWERFUL BOMBS UTILIZING A LASER DRIVEN LAUNCH SYSTEM."

u"THE RESEARCH AND COMMAND CENTER AROUND WHICH TECHNOLOGY UPGRADE MODULES ARE DEVELOPED. THE COMMAND HUB SPAWNS THE VARIOUS MODULES WITHOUT NEEDING CAPSULE-PROTOTYPES. THE CENTRAL STRUCTURE IS ALSO ABLE TO HACK INTO ENEMY COMPUTER SYSTEMS TO SOURCE INFORMATION ON THEIR NAVY AND RESOURCES. A COMMAND HUB IS REQUIRED FOR THE FUNCTIONING OF ALL BASE INFORMATION AND PROTECTION SYSTEMS."
u"DEVELOPS ENERGY GENERATION AND SAVING TECHNOLOGIES."

u"PRODUCES AND SUPPLIES AMMUNITION TO ALL UNITS THAT REQUIRE REPLENISHMENT. WITH THE CAPABILITY TO SUPPLY ALL SEVEN TYPES OF CORIUM-BASED AMMUNITION USED BY SILICON FORCES, AN ARSENAL'S PRODUCTION CAN BE ALTERED BY SWITCHING ON OR OFF SPECIFIC TYPES TO CONSERVE RESOURCES."
u"THE CENTRAL STRUCTURE FOR EVERY SILICON BASE, PROTOPLASM GENERATORS PRODUCE ALL UNITS AND THE PROTO-CAPSULES USED AS THE BASE CONSTRUCTION MATERIALS AND BLUEPRINT FOR STRUCTURES."

u"USED TO RECHARGE THE ENERGY REQUIRED TO ACTIVATE ALL SILICON UNITS AND STRUCTURES. SUBMARINES MUST RETURN TO A REPLENISH POD TO RECHARGE WHILE STRUCTURES RECEIVE ENERGY VIA DIRECT TRANSMISSION. REPLENISH PODS DO NOT GENERATE THE REQUIRED ENERGY, THIS REQUIRES THE CONSTRUCTION TO ENERGY ACCUMULATORS, HOWEVER THE NUMBER OF PODS DETERMINES THE MAXIMUM AMOUNT OF ENERGY AVAILABLE FOR USE AS ACCUMULATORS HAVE LIMITED STORAGE CAPACITY."

u"INCREASES THE RANGE OF SONAR VISIBILITY. THE STRUCTURE CAN ALSO VIEW DISTANT AREAS AFTER IT IS UPGRADED WITH THE LOCATOR TECHNOLOGY, USING A FULL CHARGE OF ENERGY FOR EACH VIEW AND TAKING SOME TIME TO RECHARGE. BIOSONAR STATIONS ALSO FUNCTION AS STEALTH DETECTION STRUCTURES AFTER THE ANTISTEALTH BIOSONAR TECHNOLOGY UPGRADE AND AS DEFENSES AGAINST ENEMY SONAR AFTER THE ANTISONAR DISPERSION SCREEN UPGRADE. BIOSONAR STATIONS HAVE A GREATER RANGE THAN SIMILAR BLACK OCTOPI AND WHITE SHARK STRUCTURES BUT ARE TOTALLY IMMOBILE."
u"AN INEXPENSIVE DEFENSIVE STRUCTURE THAT FIRES PLASMA ENERGY CHARGES AND THUS DOES NOT REQUIRE OUTSIDE AMMUNITION REPLENISHMENT."

u"A DOUBLED TURRET WHICH LAUNCHES HIGH-TEMPERATURE PLASMA ENERGY SHELLS MORE POWERFUL THAN A PP PULSAR CAN DELIVER. THEY ARE COMPARATIVELY INEXPENSIVE TO BUILD AND DO NOT REQUIRE EXTERNAL SOURCES OF AMMUNITION."

u"A TURRET WITH A WIDE FIELD OF FIRE USEFUL FOR ATTACKING ENEMY SUBS AND STRUCTURES AT VARIOUS DEPTH LEVELS. IT HAS A SMALL MINIMUM RANGE THAT MAKES IT BEST USED IN CONJUNCTION WITH OTHER DEFENSES. GAS SHELLS ARE CONSTRUCTED IN ARSENALS AND SO THE STRUCTURE REQUIRES AMMUNITION FROM ONE OF THESE STRUCTURES."

u"LAUNCHES JUMP-MINES THAT 'BOUNCE' OFF THE LANDSCAPE TOWARDS ENEMY OBJECTS. THESE MINES CAN MOVE QUITE SLOWLY AND RELY HEAVILY ON THE TERRAIN FOR MAXIMUM SPEED THUS CAN BE INEFFECTIVE IN CERTAIN ENVIRONMENTS AND AGAINST RAPIDLY MOVING ENEMY SUBS. AT ANY TIME THE JUMP-MINE LAUNCHER MAINTAINS A PERIMETER OF MINES, REPLACING THEM AS EACH IS DESTROYED. JUMP-MINES ARE CONSTRUCTED IN ARSENALS."

u"BIO-MINES CONTAIN AN ORGANIC MOLECULAR ACID THAT DAMAGES ENEMY SUBS AND STRUCTURES. THE MINES RAPIDLY HOME IN ON ENEMY OBJECTS AS THEY APPROACH. AT ANY POINT IN TIME THE BIO-MINE LAUNCHER MAINTAINS A PERIMETER OF MINES, REPLACING THEM AS THEY ARE DESTROYED. BIO-MINES, SIMILAR TO JUMP-MINES, ARE CONSTRUCTED IN ARSENALS."

u"AGAIN THIS STRUCTURE DOES NOT REQUIRE EXTERNAL AMMUNITION AS IT GENERATES SOLITON FIELDS THAT DAMAGE ENEMY OBJECTS AT ANY DEPTH LEVEL. SOLITON FIELDS IGNORE ENEMY ARMOR FOR THEIR EFFECTS AND CAN BE ADJUSTED TO DIFFERENT RANGES TO MAXIMIZE DAMAGE. THE STRUCTURE REQUIRES A GREAT DEAL OF CORIUM FOR CONSTRUCTION."

u"BY DEFAULT THESE STRUCTURES REFLECT 25% OF EXPLOSION ENERGY FROM TORPEDOES AND SHELLS THAT HIT IT BACK ON THE OFFENDER. ION REFLECTORS ALSO HAVE AN ACTIVE MODE IN WHICH IT ATTACKS ENEMIES WITH POWER CHARGES SIMILAR TO A PP PULSAR. THIS STRUCTURE DOES NOT USE AMMUNITION FROM AN ARSENAL BUT REQUIRES ACCESS TO ENERGY FROM AN ACCUMULATOR FOR ACTIVE MODE."

u"A CANNON THAT FIRES POWERFUL GUIDED ENERGY-CHARGES ABLE TO DAMAGE ENEMY OBJECTS ON DIFFERENT DEPTH LEVELS. THIS STRUCTURE DOES NOT REQUIRE EXTERNAL ENERGY SUPPLIES AND HAS NO MINIMUM RANGE. THEY SUFFER FROM A LOW FIRE RATE AND ARE BEST USED IN ASSOCIATION WITH FASTER FIRING DEFENSIVE STRUCTURES."

u"EXTRACTS SAND AND PROCESSES IT INTO USABLE SILICON. SILICON EXTRACTORS REQUIRE A CERTAIN AMOUNT OF SPACE FOR NORMAL FUNCTIONING AND CANNOT BE BUILT CLOSE TOGETHER. THESE STRUCTURES ALSO HAVE THE ABILITY TO STORE THE RESOURCE UNTIL NEEDED."
u"A MINING INSTALLATION THAT EXTRACTS CORIUM 276 FROM CORIUM DEPOSITS."
u"USED TO STORE THE CORIUM MINED BY A COLLECTOR. EACH IS ABLE TO STORE ONLY A LIMITED QUANTITY OF THE RESOURCE."

u"PRODUCES ENERGY EXTRACTED FROM THERMAL SPRINGS. THESE STRUCTURES HAVE AN EXTREMELY LIMITED ABILITY TO STORE ENERGY HOWEVER CANNOT TRANSMIT IT TO SUBS AND STRUCTURES. IT IS IMPORTANT TO BACK UP ACCUMULATORS WITH REPLENISH PODS WHICH CAN STORE LARGE AMOUNTS OF ENERGY AND TRANSMIT IT AS NEEDED."

u"TRANSFORMS CAPTURED SUBMARINES AND WRECKAGE INTO ENERGY. THIS STRUCTURE PROVIDES AN ALTERNATIVE SOURCE OF ENERGY SHOULD THERE BE SHORTAGES. IT IS MORE EFFICIENT TO TRANSFORM METAL INTO ENERGY THAN IT IS TO TRANSFORM SILICON VIA AN ENERGY CONVERTER."

u"TRANSFORMS EXTRACTED CORIUM AND SILICON INTO THE ENERGY REQUIRED TO SUSTAIN SILICON UNITS AND STRUCTURES. ENERGY CONVERTERS ARE USEFUL WHEN ENERGY SHORTAGES OCCUR. NOTE THAT CORIUM IS MORE EFFICIENTLY TRANSFORMED INTO ENERGY THAN SILICON."

u"A STRUCTURE USED TO TELEPORT ANY MOBILE OBJECT FOR LARGE DISTANCES WITHOUT ANY ENERGY EXPENSE. IT IS MADE UP OF TWO SUB-GATES WITH BOTH BEING ABLE TO SEND AND RECEIVE OBJECTS. THE SUB-GATES CAN BE BUILT AT ANY VISIBLE LOCATION AND IF ONE IS DESTROYED IT CAN BE REBUILT. TELEPORTATION THROUGH THIS GATE DOES NOT REGISTER ON ENEMY ANTI-TELEPORT SYSTEMS AND IS NOT CANCELLED BY ANTI-TELEPORT FIELDS. NOTE THAT WHILE BUILDING A GATE CLOSE TO AN ENEMY BASE CAN ALLOW REINFORCEMENTS TO RAPIDLY SWARM THE LOCATION, THE STRUCTURE IS TWO-WAY AND ENEMIES CAN USE IT TO RETURN TO THE OWNER'S BASE WITHOUT ANY NEED TO CAPTURE IT FIRST. ENEMY ACCESS CAN BE PREVENTED BY RESEARCHING THE ID TELEPORTATION TECHNOLOGY."

u"A STRUCTURE USED TO TELEPORT ANY MOBILE OBJECT FOR LARGE DISTANCES WITHOUT ANY ENERGY EXPENSE. IT IS MADE UP OF TWO SUB-GATES WITH BOTH BEING ABLE TO SEND AND RECEIVE OBJECTS. THE SUB-GATES CAN BE BUILT AT ANY VISIBLE LOCATION AND IF ONE IS DESTROYED IT CAN BE REBUILT. TELEPORTATION THROUGH THIS GATE DOES NOT REGISTER ON ENEMY ANTI-TELEPORT SYSTEMS AND IS NOT CANCELLED BY ANTI-TELEPORT FIELDS. NOTE THAT WHILE BUILDING A GATE CLOSE TO AN ENEMY BASE CAN ALLOW REINFORCEMENTS TO RAPIDLY SWARM THE LOCATION, THE STRUCTURE IS TWO-WAY AND ENEMIES CAN USE IT TO RETURN TO THE OWNER'S BASE WITHOUT ANY NEED TO CAPTURE IT FIRST. ENEMY ACCESS CAN BE PREVENTED BY RESEARCHING THE ID TELEPORTATION TECHNOLOGY."

u"THIS GENERATE A PROTECTIVE FIELD THAT REDUCES INFLICTED DAMAGE BY HALF FOR STRUCTURES ONLY. THE GENERATOR'S POWER CAN BE DIVIDED BETWEEN TWO STRUCTURES SIMULTANEOUSLY, BUT THE TOTAL EFFECT WILL NOT EXCEED FIFTY PERCENT OF THE DAMAGE BEING INFLICTED. AN ION FIELD GENERATOR CANNOT PROTECT OTHER ION FIELD GENERATOR AND MULTIPLE GENERATORS DO NOT PROVIDE ADDITIONAL PROTECTION TO ANY OTHER STRUCTURE."

u"ONCE A GIVEN TECHNOLOGY LEVEL IS REACHED THE SILICONS ARE ABLE TO RECONSTRUCT SUBS FROM THE MOLECULAR STRUCTURE INFORMATION ENCODED INTO BIO-CAPSULES LAUNCHED AS UNITS ARE DESTROYED BY THE ENEMY. RECONSTRUCTION IS MUCH CHEAPER AND SLIGHTLY FASTER THAN BUILDING NEW SUBS HOWEVER MUST BE STARTED BEFORE A PARTICULAR BIO-CAPSULE DECAYS. BIO-CAPSULES ARE COLLECTED BY BIOCOLLECTORS AND DELIVERED TO A MOLECULAR REPAIR FACILITY FOR RECONSTRUCTION. NOTE THAT IT IS POSSIBLE TO ADJUST THE PRIORITIES OF REPAIR FACILITIES TO FOCUS ON CERTAIN CLASSES OF SUBS."

u"THIS STRUCTURE LAUNCHES SATELLITES ARMED WITH LASER GUNS DESIGNED TO DESTROY STRATEGIC TARGETS FROM THE SPACE IN PRECISE STRIKES. THE SATELLITE IS CONTROLLED AND RESUPPLIED WITH ENERGY BY THE LAUNCHER AND EACH LAUNCHER CAN ONLY CONTROL A SINGLE SATELLITE AT A TIME. SATELLITES BECOME UNUSABLE WHEN THE GLS LAUNCHER IS DESTROYED AND SELF-DESTRUCT IN ORBIT."

u"THIS STATIONARY STRUCTURE PRODUCES AND LAUNCHES TACTICAL WEAPONS OF MASS DESTRUCTION CALLED VACUUM BOMBS. EACH LAUNCHER CAN ONLY STORE ONE BOMB AT A TIME. NOTE THAT BUILDING BOMBS IS EXPENSIVE AND MUST BE COMPLETED SEPARATELY TO BUILDING THE LAUNCHER."

u"THIS STRUCTURE PARALYZES ENEMY SUBS WITHIN A CERTAIN RANGE FROM IT. IT DOES NOT REQUIRE OUTER ENERGY SOURCES BUT REQUIRES TIME TO RECHARGE ITS GENERATORS. THIS OBJECT CAN BE EFFECTIVELY USED AGAINST ENEMY TELEPORTATION ATTACKS."
u"HYDRO-FUSION TECHNOLOGY - THIS TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS THE BUILDING OF HF CANNONS, STATIONARY DEFENSIVE INSTALLATIONS, WHICH DO NOT REQUIRE AMMUNITION."
u"LONG RANGE SONAR - THIS TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS THE BUILDING OF EXTRA-RANGE SONAR TO TRACE DISTANT ENEMY OBJECTS. NOTE THAT THE BLACK OCTOPI SONAR (ASDIC) HAS A BIGGER RANGE."
u"LONG RANGE ASDIC - THIS TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS THE CONSTRUCTION OF ASDIC STRUCTURES THAT INCREASES THE RANGE OF SONAR VISIBILITY ON THE SONAR MAP."

u"MOBILE REPSUB - TECHNOLOGY THAT ALLOWS THE PRODUCTION OF REPAIR SUBMARINES WHICH CAN BOTH REPAIR SUBS OF VARIOUS TYPES (EXCLUDING CYBERDOLPHINS AND CYBERWORMS) AND CARRY CARGO LIKE SUBS, CONTAINERS AND SPECIAL CARGO. IT IS CHEAPER TO REPAIR UNITS ON THESE PLATFORMS THAN ON STATIONARY REPAIR DOCKS."
u"UPGRADE TO ARMOR LEVEL 2 - THE FIRST ARMOR UPGRADE."
u"UPGRADE TO ARMOR LEVEL 3 - THE SECOND ARMOR UPGRADE."
u"UPGRADE TO ARMOR LEVEL 4 - THE THIRD ARMOR UPGRADE."
u"UPGRADE TO ENGINE CLASS 2 - THE FIRST ENGINE UPGRADE."
u"UPGRADE TO ENGINE CLASS 3 - THE SECOND ENGINE UPGRADE."
u"UPGRADE TO ENGINE CLASS 4 - THE THIRD ENGINE UPGRADE."
u"UPGRADE TO TORPEDO LEVEL 2 - UPGRADE THAT INCREASES THE EXPLOSIVE CHARGE OF REGULAR TORPEDOES (SMALL, MEDIUM AND LARGE)."
u"UPGRADE TO TORPEDO LEVEL 3 - UPGRADE THAT INCREASES THE EXPLOSIVE CHARGE OF REGULAR TORPEDOES (SMALL, MEDIUM AND LARGE)."
u"Setting priorities for oxygen consumption between different structure classes is useful for maintaining production if oxygen shortages occur."

u"Submarines automatically find an available repair facility when the Return to repair button in the Main Control Panel is selected. It is also possible to directly choose where to repair submarines by selecting the sub and clicking with the right mouse button on the appropriate repair facility when the repair cursor appears."
u"Including a Liberator in a submarine group will help detect and repel Phantoms in Stealth mode."
u"Repair objects. Repairing an object averages three times cheaper than to build a new one. In addition it only costs Metal to repair, conserving other valuable resources."
u"The number of submarines that can be transported by a TranCenter at any time depends on their size and class."
u"Gold Extractors are more efficient when placed further apart."
u"Setting priorities for oxygen consumption between different structure classes is useful for maintaining production if oxygen shortages occur."

u"Submarines automatically find an available repair facility when the Return to repair button in the Main Control Panel is selected. It is also possible to directly choose where to repair submarines by selecting the sub and clicking with the right mouse button on the appropriate repair facility when the repair cursor appears."
u"Repair objects. Repairing an object averages three times cheaper than to build a new one. In addition it only costs Metal to repair, conserving other valuable resources."
u"The number of submarines that can be transported by a Teleporter at any time depends on their size and class."
u"Build additional Power Stations to increase the effectiveness of submarines and structures using laser weapons."
u"Replenishing the energy of submarines and structures increases the speed of their regeneration process."
u"Build additional Replenish Pods to increase the total amount of energy that can be stored. Energy reserves can be crucial in heated battles."
u"Include a Replenisher in submarine groups to recharge them without the need to return to a Replenish Pod."
u"Paralyzed enemy submarines can be loaded on Suppliers and delivered to a Recyclotron to be converted into energy."
u"BioAcid Assaulters can be effective kamikaze troops. When a BioAcid Assaulter is destroyed it can inflict serious damage on nearby enemy subs and structures."
u"Develop Local Self-teleportation technology to allow Suppliers and Explorers to self-teleport without outside assistance."
u"Use the left mouse button click to select an object. A right mouse button click activates the selected object's default action towards the object under the cursor."
u"Select objects or submarines by clicking with the left mouse button on the appropriate TV screen in the Main Control Panel."
u"To get information about any object fielding the game, click with the left mouse button on the question mark ('?') button under the Main Control Panel."
u"The indicator on the right of the screen shows the depth level of the object currently under the cursor."
u"To learn how much resources are in a deposit, click with the left mouse button on the deposit."
u"The CTRL+Space bar can be used to hide or show the Main Control Panel for easier viewing of the gameplay."
u"The button below the time counter on the left from the Sonar Map shows the orientation of the gameplay map, either north, south, east or west."

u"Review the number of upgrades your subs have had, using the left mouse button click on the control in the center of the left (submarine) section of the Main Control Panel. Information on enemy submarines can be accessed in the same way."
u"Use formations to increase the battle effectiveness of your submarines."

u"You can change the depth level for Depth Mines, Laser Snares and Acoustic Mines in the same way as for submarines. To do this use the left mouse button to click on the depth level indicator on the left (sub) section of the Main Control Panel at the depth you wish for the object."

u"Use two transport submarines for each mine and resource storage facility to maximize the speed of resource collection. If the storage facility is far away from the mine it can be worth using additional transports."
u"Resource silos should be built near mines."
u"To conserve resources, turn off production of weapons in Munitions Factory, ArmCenters and Arsenals that are not being used."
u"Depth Mines, Laser Snares and Acoustic Mines belts are effective in blunting a massive enemy attack."
u"UPGRADE TO TORPEDO LEVEL 4 - INCREASES THE EXPLOSIVE CHARGE OF REGULAR TORPEDOES (SMALL, MEDIUM AND LARGE)."
u"UPGRADE TO TORPEDO LEVEL 5 - INCREASES THE EXPLOSIVE CHARGE OF REGULAR TORPEDOES (SMALL, MEDIUM AND LARGE)."

u"MEDIUM TORPEDO TECHNOLOGY - MEDIUM TORPEDOES CONTAIN MULTIPLE WARHEADS WHICH EXPLODE IN SEQUENCE TO PENETRATE ARMOR AND DAMAGE IMPORTANT PARTS OF ENEMY SUBS. THEY ARE USED ON STATIONARY LAUNCHING TORPEDO PLATFORMS (STOLP)."

u"LARGE TORPEDO TECHNOLOGY - LARGE TORPEDOES HAVE AN IMPROVED HOLLOW CHARGE WARHEAD, WHICH INCREASES THE DAMAGE TO ENEMY ARMORED OBJECTS. LARGE TORPEDOES ARE INSTALLED ON CRUISERS, WHICH HAVE GOOD SPEED AND EXCEPTIONAL ARMOR, MAKING THEM VERY EFFECTIVE AT ATTACKING ENEMY DEFENSIVE STRUCTURES."

u"DEPTH MINE TECHNOLOGY - TECHNOLOGY THAT ALLOWS THE CREATION OF MINE BELTS MADE UP OF DEPTH MINES. THESE MINES ARE INVISIBLE TO ENEMY SUBS AND ARE EXTREMELY EFFECTIVE AT PROTECTING NARROW PASSAGEWAYS. AN ARMCENTER IS USED TO PRODUCE THE MINES AND THE MINE-LAYER CLASS OF SUB CARRIES AND LAYS THEM. THE MINE-LAYER IS A MEDIUM SIZED SUB LIGHTLY ARMED WITH SMALL TORPEDOES AND REQUIRES AN ESCORT BY MORE HEAVILY ARMED SUBS FOR PROTECTION WHILST LAYING MINES."

u"MOBILE SONAR TECHNOLOGY - THIS TECHNOLOGY INSTALLS SONARS ON ALL SUBMARINES IN YOUR NAVY. MOBILE SONAR DOESN'T INCREASE THE VISIBILITY RANGE OF SUBS, IT SIMPLY ALLOWS THEM TO WORK WITH STATIONARY SONAR INSTALLATIONS TO SEE ENEMIES ON THE RADAR MAP."
u"UPGRADE HF CANNON FIRE-RATE - INCREASES THE FIRE RATE OF STATIONARY HF CANNONS. THE UPGRADE DOES NOT APPLY TO SUBS ARMED WITH AN HF CANNON."

u"SHARK CONTROL TECHNOLOGY - THIS TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS THE CREATION OF SHARK CONTROL CENTERS THAT CAN CONTROL THE BEHAVIOR OF UP TO THREE SHARKS SIMULTANEOUSLY. SHARKS ARE USED TO PROTECT YOUR OBJECTS FROM CYBER-CREATURE ATTACKS (DOLPHINS AND WORMS). WHEN THE NUMBER OF SHARKS CONTROLLED IS LESS THAN THREE, THE SHARK CONTROL GENERATES SPECIAL IMPULSES TO ATTRACT SHARKS TO THE AREA."

u"RESEARCH ENEMY CIPHER KEY - THIS TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS THE BUILDING OF INFOCENTERS TO TIE INTO THE ENEMY MILITARY COMPUTER NETWORK AND EXTRAPOLATE USEFUL INFORMATION ABOUT ENEMY SUBS, STRUCTURES AND RESOURCE LEVELS."

u"MARAUDER EQUIPMENT - THIS TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS THE PRODUCTION OF A NEW CLASS OF SUBMARINE, THE MARAUDER. THIS SUB HAS THE UNIQUE ABILITY TO CAPTURE ENEMY OBJECTS SUCH AS DEFENSIVE STRUCTURES FOR FURTHER USE AND TO GAIN ACCESS TO UNIQUE ENEMY TECHNOLOGIES. TIME PERIOD WITHIN WHICH ENEMY TECHNOLOGIES BECOME AVAILABLE FOR THE RESEARCH IS LIMITED. IT VARIES BETWEEN 10-30 SECONDS FROM THE MOMENT YOU CAPTURE AN ENEMY OBJECT AND DEPENDS ON THE TYPE OF THE OBJECT. YOU CAN START SIMULTANEOUS RESEARCH OF ENEMY TECHNOLOGIES, WHICH BECOME AVAILABLE FOR YOU AT SEVERAL TECHCENTERS. THE MARAUDER HAS GOOD ARMOR AND IS ARMED WITH SMALL TORPEDOES."

u"ULTRASONIC TECHNOLOGY - THIS TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS THE CREATION OF DEFENSIVE STRUCTURES THAT EMIT A SPECIAL PROTECTIVE FIELD TO DAMAGE ALL ENEMIES ATTEMPTING TO PENETRATE ITS RADIUS. DAMAGE CONTINUES TO ACCUMULATE UNTIL THE ENEMY IS DESTROYED OR WITHDRAWS FROM THE EFFECTIVE FIELD RADIUS."

u"UPGRADE TO MOBILITY - ALLOWS STATIONARY DEFENSIVE STRUCTURES TO MOVE AND THUS CAN RADICALLY CHANGE THE OFFENSIVE AND DEFENSIVE OPTIONS OPEN TO A COMMANDER. DEFENSIVE STRUCTURES MOVE MUCH SLOWER THAN ANY SUB AND CANNOT BE SELF-REPAIRED WHILE MOVING. GENERALLY THEY WILL REQUIRE A SUBMARINE ESCORT IF MOVING THROUGH HOSTILE AREAS."

u"DISPERSER SCREEN TECHNOLOGY - THIS TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS THE BUILDING OF DISPERSERS - STATIONARY DEFENSIVE STRUCTURES THAT ABSORB SONAR AND CREATE 'DEAD SPOTS' WHICH CANNOT BE PENETRATED BY ENEMY SONAR."

u"ANTIPHANTOM TECHNOLOGY - THE RESULT OF THIS RESEARCH IS A GENERATOR ABLE TO DETECT ENEMY SUBMARINES WHILE THEY ARE IN STEALTH MODE. ANTIPHANTOM GENERATORS ARE INSTALLED ON LIBERATORS AND STATIONARY DISPERSERS. THE LIBERATOR CLASS IS A SUB ARMED WITH ONE HF CANNON AND THREE BEACONS THAT TRACK ENEMY SUBS IN SURROUNDING AREAS (INCLUDING THOSE IN STEALTH MODE) FOR A PERIOD OF TIME LIMITED BY THEIR AUTONOMOUS ENERGY RESOURCES."
u"TELEPORTATION TECHNOLOGY - REVOLUTIONARY TECHNOLOGY THAT ALLOWS THE INSTANT TRANSPORTATION OF ANY SUB TO ANY SPOT ON THE MAP. A SPECIAL STRUCTURE, THE TRANCENTER, IS USED TO TELEPORT OBJECTS."

u"DEPTH BOMB TECHNOLOGY - THIS TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS THE PRODUCTION OF DEPTH BOMBS, WHICH ARE INTENDED TO EFFECTIVELY ATTACK GROUPS OF ENEMY OBJECTS FROM ABOVE. DEPTH BOMBS ARE CARRIED BY DC BOMBERS, WHICH HAVE MEDIUM ARMOR LEVEL AND ARE ARMED WITH SMALL TORPEDOES. THEIR SLOW SPEED MAKES DC BOMBERS VULNERABLE WITHOUT A SUPPORTING ATTACK SUBMARINE FORCE."

u"PSY TECHNOLOGY - A UNIQUE TECHNOLOGY ALLOWING THE BUILDING OF PSY-GENERATOR, WHICH DISORIENTATE ENEMIES IN NEARBY AREAS BY EMITTING A HIGH-FREQUENCY PSY-FIELD. THIS FIELD PREVENTS ENEMY SUBS FROM BEING ABLE TO DISTINGUISH FRIENDS FROM FOES AND THEY WILL START FIRING AT THE NEAREST OBJECT REGARDLESS OF ALLEGIANCE. THIS WEAPON IS VERY EFFECTIVE IN DEFENSE AGAINST ENEMY GROUP ATTACKS."
u"CYBER TECHNOLOGY - THIS TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS CREATION AND UTILIZATION OF CYBERWORMS, A CYBER CREATURE THAT IS ABLE TO PENETRATE ENEMY SILOS AND CORIUM STORES AND STEAL ENEMY RESOURCES."
u"ARMCENTER UPGRADE - IMPROVES THE PRODUCTIVITY OF ARMCENTERS. AFTER THE UPGRADE AMMO WILL BE PRODUCED 1.5 TIMES FASTER THAN PREVIOUSLY."
u"PLASMA GENERATOR - TECHNOLOGY TO ALLOW THE BUILDING OF STATIONARY PLASMA GENERATORS. THEY HAVE A GREATER FIRE RATE THAN THE SAME GENERATORS INSTALLED ON TERMINATOR TYPE OF SUBMARINES."
u"RESEARCH CORIUM 296 - THIS TECHNOLOGY IS THE FIRST STEP TO THE CREATION OF WEAPONS OF MASS DESTRUCTION. IT ALLOWS BUILDING PLASMATRONS TO PRODUCE ENRICHED CORIUM ISOTOPES."

u"THERMO-NUCLEAR TECHNOLOGY - THIS TECHNOLOGY IS NECESSARY TO USE CORIUM296 AS A CHARGE IN WARHEADS OR BALLISTIC ROCKETS AND TO CREATE THE LAUNCH AND NAVIGATIONAL SYSTEM OF SUCH ROCKETS. AS A RESULT OF THIS RESEARCH THE COMMANDER WILL BE ABLE TO BUILD THERMO-NUCLEAR LAUNCHING SHAFTS AND LAUNCH ROCKETS (PRODUCED AT A PLASMATRON) FROM THEM."

u"ENERGY SHIELD - ALLOWS THE BUILDING OF POWER PROTECTOR STRUCTURES THAT GENERATE SPECIAL ENERGY FIELDS AROUND THEMSELVES INTO WHICH NO ENEMY OBJECT IS ABLE TO PENETRATE, INCLUDING TORPEDOES, SHELLS AND DESTRUCTIVE FIELDS. OVER TIME AND UNDER NUMEROUS IMPACTS THE SHIELDS DETERIORATE."

u"ANTILASER SCREEN - THIS TECHNOLOGY IS USEFUL AGAINST ENEMY SUBS AND DEFENSIVE CONSTRUCTIONS ARMED WITH LASERS. PROTECTIVE ANTILASER SCREENS ONCE INSTALLED ON SUBS WILL REFLECT 25% OF DAMAGE BACK ONTO THE ATTACKER. THIS IS AUTOMATICALLY INSTALLED ONTO ALL SUBS ONCE RESEARCHED."
u"UPGRADE ULTRASONIC GENERATOR - INCREASES THE RANGE OF ULTRASONIC GENERATOR BY 30%."
u"UPGRADE SONAR RANGE - INCREASES THE RANGE OF STATIONARY SONAR INSTALLATIONS. THIS UPGRADE ALSO ALLOWS THE PLAYER TO VIEW A DISTANT PORTION OF THE MAP FOR A LIMITED PERIOD OF TIME."
u"UPGRADE MINE PRODUCTIVITY - INCREASES THE PRODUCTIVITY OF METAL AND CORIUM MINES BY 25% AND CORRESPONDINGLY REDUCES THE TIME REQUIRED TO LOAD/UNLOAD TRANSUBS."
u"IMPROVE REPAIR TECHNOLOGY - ACCELERATES THE REPAIR TIME OF SUBMARINES BY REPCENTER AND REPSUB BY 1.5 TIMES."
u"INCREASE TRANCENTER RECHARGE - THIS UPGRADE REDUCES BY 25% THE TIME REQUIRED FOR TRANCENTER RECHARGES."
u"PLASMA CANNON TECHNOLOGY - TECHNOLOGY TO ALLOW THE BUILDING OF STATIONARY PLASMA GENERATORS. THEY HAVE A GREATER FIRE RATE THAN THE SAME GENERATORS INSTALLED ON TERMINATOR TYPE OF SUBMARINES."

u"SPLINTER TORPEDO TECHNOLOGY - ALLOWS THE CONSTRUCTION OF A NEW TYPE OF SUBMARINE, THE DESTROYER CLASS, ARMED WITH SPLINTER TORPEDOES. WHEN A SPLINTER TORPEDO HITS A TARGET IT EXPLODES INTO SHRAPNEL, PRODUCING MULTIPLE SPLINTERS THAT DAMAGE ALL OBJECTS CLOSE TO THE EXPLOSION."
u"RUBY LASER TECHNOLOGY - ALLOWS THE CONSTRUCTION OF HEAVY CRUISER CLASS SUBMARINES, ARMED WITH RUBY LASERS. A RUBY LASER IS MORE POWERFUL THAN A LIGHT LASER, BUT REQUIRES TIME FOR RECHARGING."

u"RADIO CLUTTER TECHNOLOGY - THIS TECHNOLOGY INSTALLS ANTISONAR RADIO CLUTTER GENERATORS ON ALL CLASSES OF SUBMARINES IN YOUR NAVY WHICH MAKES THAT INVISIBLE TO ENEMY SONARS FOR A CERTAIN PERIOD OF TIME. THE GENERATORS ARE WORKING IN AUTOMATIC PULSE MODE AND DO NOT REQUIRE ANY RESOURCES FOR THEIR WORK."

u"LASER SNARE TECHNOLOGY - THIS TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS THE PRODUCTION OF A NEW CLASS OF SUB NAMED THE DEFENDER. IT IS ARMED WITH SMALL TORPEDOES AND LASER SNARES, WHICH ARE USED EXCLUSIVELY TO CREATE ANTISUB BELTS."
u"GAS LASER TECHNOLOGY - ALLOWS THE CONSTRUCTION OF A POWERFUL DEFENSIVE STRUCTURE, THE DOUBLE-BARRELED HEAVY LASER."
u"STEALTH SCOUT TECHNOLOGY - ALLOWS THE BLACK OCTOPI TO PRODUCE STEALTH SCOUTS, SUBS EQUIPPED WITH A STEALTH GENERATOR, WHICH MAKES THEM INVISIBLE TO MOST ENEMIES."
u"CASSETTE-SHELL TECHNOLOGY - SPECIFIC TECHNOLOGY REQUIRED FOR PRODUCING INVADERS CLASS SUBS, ARMED WITH CASSETTE SHELLS. THEY ARE DESIGNED TO DAMAGE GROUPS OF ENEMY OBJECTS."
u"MAGNETIC MINE TECHNOLOGY - ALLOWS THE PRODUCTION OF MAGNETIC-MINE LAUNCHERS ARMED WITH CASSETTE SHELLS AND MAGNETIC MINES WHICH ARE ABLE TO SEEK AND PURSUE ANY TARGETS."
u"RESEARCH ENERGY SUPPLY - STRATEGICALLY IMPORTANT TECHNOLOGY THAT ALLOWS THE INSTANT RECHARGE OF SUBMARINE LASERS VIA CHANNELED ENERGY TELEPORTATION."

u"ELECTRO-MAGNETIC TORPEDOES - ALLOWS THE PRODUCTION OF ELECTRO-MAGNETIC LAUNCHERS AND THEIR AMMUNITION, ELECTROMAGNETIC TORPEDOES. BESIDES THE INITIAL DAMAGE FROM THE IMPACT OF THESE TORPEDOES, ON SUBMARINES THERE IS A CONTINUING DAMAGING EFFECT PRODUCED BY THE ELECTROMAGNETIC FIELD THAT DESTROYS ADDITIONAL EQUIPMENT SUCH AS DEFENSIVE SCREENS AND SHIELDS. THE SUB WILL CONTINUE LOSING LIFE UNTIL DESTROYED OR IT ENTERS REPAIR. THE ELECTRO-MAGNETIC LAUNCHER (EML) NEEDED TO LAUNCH THESE TORPEDOES HAS A LIMITED AMMUNITION CAPACITY AND WILL REQUIRE PERIODIC REPLENISHMENT FROM A MUNITIONS FACTORY. NOTE THAT ELECTROMAGNETIC TORPEDOES HAVE A HIGH COST."

u"PHANTOM EQUIPMENT - THIS TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS THE CONSTRUCTION OF PHANTOM CLASS SUBS. ARMED WITH LASER WEAPONS AND EQUIPPED WITH STEALTH GENERATORS, THEY CAN BECOME INVISIBLE FOR A LIMITED PERIOD OF TIME."
u"ANTIULTRASONIC SCREEN - THIS TECHNOLOGY REDUCES THE DAMAGE FROM ULTRASONIC GENERATORS ON SUBS BY 25%."

u"PARALYZING RAYS TECHNOLOGY - ALLOWS THE PRODUCTION OF AVENGER CLASS SUBS. ARMED WITH SPECIAL PARALYZING CHARGES, THEY CAN RENDER ENEMY UNITS AND STRUCTURES UNABLE TO FIRE AND IMMOBILE FOR A CERTAIN PERIOD OF TIME."
u"UPGRADE ENERGY SUPPLY - STRATEGICALLY IMPORTANT TECHNOLOGY THAT ALLOWS THE INSTANT RECHARGE OF SUBMARINE LASERS VIA CHANNELED ENERGY TELEPORTATION."
u"PROTECTIVE SCREEN TECHNOLOGY - ALLOWS THE CONSTRUCTION OF PROTECTIVE SHIELD GENERATORS, WHICH REDUCE THE DAMAGE FROM ENEMY WEAPONS BY 25% WITHIN THE RADIUS OF THE SCREEN."
u"LASER BOMB TECHNOLOGY - ALLOWS CONSTRUCTION OF LASER BOMB LAUNCHERS, WHICH PRODUCE AND LAUNCH HIGHLY DESTRUCTIVE LASER BOMBS."
u"LIGHT LASER TECHNOLOGY - ALLOWS THE BLACK OCTOPI TO BUILD THE LIGHT LASER DEFENSIVE STRUCTURES."
u"UPGRADE LIGHT LASER RANGE - INCREASES THE RANGE OF LIGHT LASERS."
u"UPGRADE HEAVY LASER RANGE - INCREASES THE RANGE OF HEAVY LASERS."
u"UPGRADE LIGHT LASER RATE - INCREASES THE FIRE RATE OF LIGHT LASER. LASER RECHARGE SPEED REMAINS UNCHANGED."
u"UPGRADE HEAVY LASER RATE - INCREASES THE FIRE RATE OF HEAVY LASERS. LASER RECHARGE SPEED REMAINS UNCHANGED."

u"UPGRADE SUBS LASER RATE - INCREASES THE FIRE RATE FOR LASER WEAPONS ON HEAVY CRUISER, RAIDER AND PHANTOM CLASS SUBMARINES. NOTE THAT THE UPGRADE DOES NOT REDUCE THE TIME REQUIRED FOR LASER RECHARGING, HENCE IT BECOMES POSSIBLE TO EXPEND EXISTING ENERGY RESERVES FASTER."

u"TELESHIELD - THIS TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS THE BUILDING OF TELESHIELDS - SPECIAL STRUCTURES THAT CREATE A SPHERICAL ZONE AROUND THEMSELVES THAT PREVENTS ENEMY TELEPORTERS FROM LOCKING ON AND TELEPORTING IN SUBMARINES. TELESHIELDS ARE INTENDED TO PROTECT AREAS FROM UNEXPECTED ENEMY PENETRATION, ESPECIALLY FROM RAIDERS AND USURPERS."
u"LASER SNARE DETECTION - THIS TECHNOLOGY IS AN UPGRADE FOR THE MINE-LAYER CLASS OF SUBMARINES THAT ALLOWS THEM TO SEEK AND DESTROY ENEMY LASER SNARES."
u"UPGRADE HACK ABILITY - THIS TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS INFOCENTERS GREATER ACCESS TO ENEMY DATABASE SYSTEMS SO THEY CAN GET MORE INFORMATION ABOUT THE ENEMY."
u"UPGRADE SHARK CONTROL - INCREASES THE EFFECTIVE ZONE OF SHARK CONTROL AND THE NUMBER OF SHARKS WHICH CAN BE SIMULTANEOUSLY CONTROLLED BY EACH CENTER FROM THREE TO FIVE."

u"INCREASE INFORMATION SECURITY - THIS TECHNOLOGY INCREASES YOUR DATA PROTECTION, WHICH REDUCES THE SPEED OF ENEMY DATA INTRUSION BY 2 TIMES AND ALLOWS, WITH THE HELP OF AN INFOCENTER, THE COMMANDER TO LOCATE THE OBJECT FROM WHERE THE INTRUSION WAS MADE."
u"DETECT TELEPORTATION - THIS TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS A TRANCENTER TO AUTOMATICALLY LOCATE AND INFORM THE COMMANDER ABOUT ENEMY TELEPORT ACTIVITIES, INCLUDING WHERE THEY ARE TELEPORTING FROM AND TO."
u"DEPTH & ACOUSTIC MINE DETECTION - THIS UPGRADE OF THE DEFENDER CLASS OF SUB ALLOWS THEM TO LOCATE AND DESTROY ENEMY DEPTH MINES AND ACOUSTIC MINES."

u"ANTI LASER BOMB DEFENSE SYSTEM - THIS TECHNOLOGY DEVELOPS MEDIA THAT REDUCES ACCURACY OF ENEMY LASER BOMBS. AFTER RESEARCH OF THIS TECHNOLOGY, THE INFOCENTER WILL NOT ONLY BE ABLE TO INFORM YOU ABOUT ENEMY LASER BOMB LAUNCHES BUT ALSO AFFECTS BOMB NAVIGATION SYSTEMS AND REDUCES THEIR ACCURACY. DEGREES OF BOMB DEVIATION VARY FROM TIME TO TIME."

u"ANTI NUCLEAR DEFENSE SYSTEM - THIS TECHNOLOGY DEVELOPS MEDIA THAT REDUCES ACCURACY OF ENEMY ROCKET TN-WARHEADS. AFTER THE DEVELOPMENT OF THIS TECHNOLOGY CENTCOMP WILL NOT ONLY BE ABLE TO INFORM YOU ABOUT ENEMY ROCKET LAUNCHES BUT ALSO AFFECTS ROCKET NAVIGATION SYSTEMS AND REDUCES THEIR ACCURACY. DEGREES OF ROCKET DEVIATION VARY FROM TIME TO TIME."

u"BIOSONAR TECHNOLOGY - A VITAL TECHNOLOGY THAT ALLOWS THE CONSTRUCTION OF BIOSONAR STATIONS TO INCREASE THE RANGE OF SONAR VISIBILITY. THESE STRUCTURES ARE MORE POWERFUL THAN HUMAN SONAR AND ASDIC EQUIVALENTS AND NOT ONLY HAVE A LARGER RANGE BUT ALSO GAIN ADDITIONAL ABILITIES WITH FURTHER RESEARCH."
u"HUMAN CIPHER KEY - THIS TECHNOLOGY IS NECESSARY TO SUCCESSFULLY GAIN INTELLIGENCE ABOUT ENEMIES AFTER HACKING INTO THEIR COMPUTER SYSTEMS."

u"LOCATOR - AN UPGRADE TO BIOSONAR STATIONS, LOCATOR TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS THE STATIONS TO VIEW A DISTANT PART OF THE MAP FOR A LIMITED PERIOD OF TIME THROUGH A FOCUSED BIOSONAR ENERGY DISCHARGE. THE ENERGY CONSUMPTION OF THIS TECHNOLOGY IS QUITE HIGH AND CAN TAKE SOME TIME TO RECHARGE FOR A SECOND LOOK."

u"DATA SECURITY UPGRADE - IMPROVED INTRUSION DETECTION, THIS TECHNOLOGY HALVES THE AMOUNT OF TIME FOR WHICH AN ENEMY CAN VIEW INTELLIGENCE ON YOUR NAVY AND RESOURCES BASED ON ANY SUCCESSFUL HACK OF YOUR COMPUTER SYSTEM. IT ALSO ALLOWS YOU TO LOCATE THE SOURCE OF THE ENEMY INTRUSION FOR A COUNTERSTRIKE."

u"ANTISONAR DISPERSION SCREEN - THIS IS ANOTHER UPGRADE TO BIOSONAR STATIONS THAT ALLOWS THEM TO DISTORT ENEMY SONAR TO HIDE A PORTION OF THE MAP SURROUNDING THE STATION. THE EFFECTIVE RANGE OF THE SCREEN IS LESS THAN THE ACTIVE DETECTION RANGE OF THESE STATIONS AND IS REPRESENTED BY CONCENTRIC CIRCLES ON THE SONAR MAP WHEN A STATION IS SELECTED."
u"DATA INTRUSION - FOR SUCCESSFUL HACKS ON AN ENEMY THIS TECHNOLOGY DOUBLES THE LENGTH OF TIME FOR WHICH THEIR INTELLIGENCE IS VISIBLE."

u"ANTISTEALTH BIOSONAR - AFTER THIS TECHNOLOGY HAS BEEN RESEARCHED, ANTISTEALTH GENERATORS ARE INSTALLED ON ALL BIOSONAR STATIONS. THESE GENERATORS DETECT ANY ENEMY SUBS USING STEALTH MODE GENERATORS WITHIN A RADIUS EQUAL TO THE ANTISONAR RADIUS OF THE STATIONS."
u"DEPTH && ACOUSTIC MINE DETECTION - THIS TECHNOLOGY IS AN UPGRADE OF BIO-ACID ASSAULTER SUBMARINES THAT ALLOWS THEM TO LOCATE AND DESTROY ENEMY DEPTH AND ACOUSTIC MINES."
u"LASER SNARE DETECTION - THIS TECHNOLOGY IS AN UPGRADE OF BIO-ACID ASSAULTER SUBMARINES THAT ALLOWS THEM TO LOCATE AND DESTROY ENEMY LASER SNARES."

u"TELEPORTATION DETECTION - THIS IS ANOTHER UPGRADE TO COMMAND HUB STATIONS TO ALLOW THEM TO DETECT THE SOURCE AND DESTINATION POINT OF TELEPORTING ENEMY UNITS. IT IS CRUCIAL IN PROVIDING AN EARLY WARNING OF A SURPRISE ENEMY ATTACK."

u"ENERGY CONSERVATION LEVEL 2 - IMPROVES THE EFFICIENCY OF SUBS AND STRUCTURES IN USING AND STORING ENERGY BY 50% OVER LEVEL 1. THIS PROVIDES A REDUCTION IN THE ENERGY REQUIRED TO POWER CERTAIN OBJECTS."

u"ENERGY CONSERVATION LEVEL 3 - IMPROVES THE EFFICIENCY OF SUBS AND STRUCTURES IN USING AND STORING ENERGY BY 100% OVER LEVEL 1. THIS PROVIDES A BIG REDUCTION IN THE ENERGY REQUIRED TO POWER CERTAIN OBJECTS."

u"ENERGY CONSERVATION LEVEL 4 - IMPROVES THE EFFICIENCY OF SUBS AND STRUCTURES IN USING AND STORING ENERGY BY 150% OVER LEVEL 1. THIS PROVIDES A LARGE REDUCTION IN THE ENERGY REQUIRED TO POWER CERTAIN OBJECTS."
u"TRANSFORM CORIUM TO ENERGY - A TECHNOLOGY THAT ALLOWS THE TRANSFORMATION OF CORIUM AND SILICON INTO ENERGY WHEN REQUIRED. THE CONVERSION OCCURS AT AN ENERGY CONVERTER."
u"UPGRADE ENERGY ACCUMULATOR - THIS UPGRADE INCREASES THE ENERGY RECHARGE RATE OF ENERGY ACCUMULATORS BY 25%."

u"ENERGY TRANSMITTER - THE ABILITY TO TRANSMIT ENERGY LEADS TO A NEW CLASS OF SUBS, REPLENISHERS. REPLENISHERS ARE MOBILE BATTERIES FOR ENERGY AND PERMIT SILICON SUBS TO ROAM FREELY WITHOUT THE NEED TO RETURN TO A REPLENISH POD TO RECHARGE. THEY RECEIVE ENERGY FROM A FRIENDLY BASE AND RETRANSMIT IT TO A LIMITED AREA AROUND THEM, PROVIDING INSTANT RECHARGES. NOTE THAT THE SUB IS POORLY ARMED AND ARMORED."

u"ANNIHILATION TECHNOLOGY - THIS TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS METAL WRECKAGE, PARALYZED SUBS AND CARGO CAPTURED FROM THE WHITE SHARKS OR BLACK OCTOPI TO BE CONVERTED INTO ENERGY. THE CONVERSION OCCURS AT A RECYCLOTRON AND SUPPLIERS ARE USED TO TRANSPORT THE MATERIALS TO THE STRUCTURE."
u"UPGRADE SILICON EXTRACTOR - A MINING TECHNIQUE IMPROVEMENT, THIS UPGRADE INCREASES THE SPEED OF SILICON EXTRACTION BY 25%."
u"UPGRADE CORIUM COLLECTOR - THIS UPGRADE DECREASES THE TIME IT TAKES TO LOAD A TRANSPORT WITH CORIUM BY 25%."
u"POLARIZED PLASMA PULSAR - ALLOWS THE CONSTRUCTION OF PP PULSAR FIXED DEFENSIVE INSTALLATIONS, WHICH DO NOT REQUIRE AMMUNITION OR ENERGY."

u"GAS SHELL LAUNCHER - REQUIRED TO CREATE SPECIALIST FIXED DEFENSIVE STRUCTURES CALLED GAS SHELL LAUNCHERS. THESE LAUNCHERS REQUIRE SPECIAL AMMUNITION FROM AN ARSENAL BUT ARE ABLE TO ATTACK DIFFERENT DEPTH LEVELS."

u"SOLITON OSCILLATOR - BASED ON USING SOLITON WAVES GENERATED BY CRYSTALS THAT CAN BE TRANSMITTED BY WATER, THESE OSCILLATORS DO NOT REQUIRE EXTERNAL SOURCES OF AMMUNITION AND HAVE THE PROPERTY OF BEING ABLE TO REGULATE THE AMOUNT OF DAMAGE THEY DO BY ALTERING THEIR ACTIVE RANGE. SILICON OSCILLATORS WORK VERY WELL IN GROUPS AS DAMAGE IS AT A CONSTANT RATE AND ACCUMULATES VERY QUICKLY."

u"BIO-MINE LAUNCHER - ALLOWS THE CREATION OF FIXED DEFENSIVE LAUNCHERS WHICH 'FIRE' BIO-MINES. THESE MINES ARE SIMILAR TO BIO-ACID SHELLS BUT CONTAIN A HOMING MECHANISM THAT ALLOWS THEM TO ZERO IN ON NEARBY ENEMY UNITS. BIO-MINE LAUNCHERS AUTOMATICALLY REPLENISH THE NUMBER OF MINES IN THEIR VICINITY BY FIRING MORE WHENEVER ONE IS DESTROYED WHILST DAMAGING AN ENEMY. HOWEVER BIO-MINES THEMSELVES ARE MANUFACTURED IN AN ARSENAL."

u"DOUBLE PLASMA TURRET GUN (DPT GUN) - AN UPGRADE TO ALLOW PP PULSAR TECHNOLOGY TO BE USED IN TWIN MOUNTS. THE RESULTING DOUBLE PLASMA TURRET GUN LIKE PP PULSARS DOES NOT REQUIRE AMMUNITION AND HAS HIGHER FIRE RATE AND ATTACK STRENGTH."

u"UPGRADE PP PULSAR FIRE RATE - INCREASES THE FIRE RATE OF PP PULSARS BY TWO TIMES BY IMPROVING THE EFFICIENCY OF THEIR ABILITY TO RECHARGE. THIS DOES NOT INCREASE THE POWER OF EACH INDIVIDUAL ATTACK."

u"JUMP-MINE LAUNCHER - ALLOWS THE CREATION OF DEFENSIVE JUMP-MINE LAUNCHERS WHICH LAUNCH MINES THAT 'BOUNCE' OR JUMP ACROSS THE SEA BED OR NEARBY UNDERSEA FORMATIONS TO REACH ENEMY SUBMARINES. SIMILAR TO BIO-MINE LAUNCHERS, JUMP-MINE LAUNCHERS AUTOMATICALLY REPLENISH THE NUMBER OF MINES IN THEIR VICINITY UP TO A GIVEN LIMIT, HOWEVER THE JUMP-MINES THEMSELVES ARE MADE IN AN ARSENAL. THE EFFECTIVENESS OF JUMP-MINES DEPENDS ON THE LANDSCAPE AND ENEMY SPEED. FAST SUBS MAY BE ABLE TO OUTRUN THESE MINES."

u"ION REFLECTOR (25% SCREEN) - ION REFLECTORS ARE BASED ON THE SAME PRINCIPLE AS ION FIELD GENERATORS. HOWEVER RATHER THAN CREATING A SHIELD THESE FIXED DEFENSES REFLECT 25% OF AN ATTACKER'S ATTACK STRENGTH FROM ANY TYPE OF WEAPON BACK ON THEM. ION REFLECTORS DO NOT REQUIRE AMMUNITION HOWEVER DO RUN OUT OF ENERGY AND REQUIRE A CERTAIN AMOUNT OF TIME TO RECHARGE.\\N  NOTE THAT ION REFLECTORS ONLY REFLECT BACK ATTACKS DIRECTLY ON THEM."
u"UPGRADE GSL FIRE RATE - UPGRADES THE RECHARGE RATE FOR GAS SHELL LAUNCHERS BY TWO TIMES. THIS DOES NOT INCREASE THE POWER OF EACH INDIVIDUAL ATTACK."

u"PARCHER - A VERY POWERFUL FIXED DEFENSE, PARCHERS GENERATE STRONG GUIDED ENERGY CHARGES THAT CAN DAMAGE ENEMY SUBS AND STRUCTURES ON ANY DEPTH LEVEL. PARCHERS DO NOT REQUIRE AMMUNITION HOWEVER HAVE A SLOW FIRE RATE."

u"LOCAL TELEPORTATION - THIS USEFUL TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS SOME SILICON SUBS TO TELEPORT THEMSELVES TO ANY PORTION OF THE MAP (EVEN THOSE UNREACHABLE BY REGULAR MOVEMENT). SELF-TELEPORTATION REQUIRES A FULL CHARGE IN THE TELEPORTATION GENERATORS AND IT TAKES SOME TIME TO RECHARGE."

u"TELEPORTATION GATE - THE FURTHER DEVELOPMENT OF TELEPORTATION TECHNOLOGY. THIS ALLOWS THE CONSTRUCTION OF TELEPORTATION GATE THAT CAN TELEPORT ANY MOBILE UNIT. NOTE THAT GATES CONSIST OF TWO PARTS AND IF EITHER IS DESTROYED THE OTHER WILL NOT WORK UNTIL IT IS REBUILT. THESE GATES DO NOT REQUIRE EXTERNAL ENERGY SOURCES AND ARE CONSTANTLY ACTIVE, HOWEVER THEY ALSO MAKE NO DISTINCTION BETWEEN FRIEND AND FOE AND THUS ENEMY UNITS CAN ALSO USE A GATE TO TELEPORT."

u"GAS LASER SATELLITE - THIS TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS THE CREATION OF SPECIAL LOW ORBIT GAS LASER SATELLITE LAUNCHERS. THESE LAUNCH AND GUIDE THE SINGLE-USE SATELLITES TO DESTROY STRATEGIC TARGETS. THE LAUNCHER USES A HIGH-POWERED LASER TO LAUNCH AND GUIDE THE SATELLITE AND MUST BE RECHARGED BETWEEN USES. IF A LAUNCHER IS DESTROYED BEFORE A SATELLITE REACHES ITS TARGET THE SATELLITE WILL BURN UP ON REENTRY WITHOUT INFLICTING DAMAGE."
u"ID TELEPORTATION - THIS SECURITY MEASURE PREVENTS ENEMY UNITS FROM USING TELEPORTATION GATES BY INSTALLING A SOPHISTICATED CHECKER ON EACH GATE AUTOMATICALLY ONCE RESEARCHED."

u"ANTI NUCLEAR DEFENSE SYSTEM - THIS IS A TWO-EDGED TECHNOLOGY. IT ALLOWS THE DETECTION OF ENEMY THERMO-NUCLEAR ROCKET LAUNCHES AND ALSO INTERFERES WITH THEIR GUIDANCE SYSTEMS ONCE WITHIN RANGE OF THE COMMAND HUB. THE AMOUNT OF DEVIATION FROM THE TARGET WILL VARY AND THE ROCKET MUST ENTER THE ACTIVE RADIUS (WHICH WILL BE DISPLAYED ON THE SONAR MAP WHEN THE COMMAND HUB IS SELECTED) BEFORE BEING AFFECTED. NOTE THAT THIS MAY CAUSE ROCKETS TO HIT MORE IMPORTANT STRUCTURES THAN THEIR ORIGINAL TARGETS."
u"ANTI LASER BOMB DEFENSE SYSTEM - N/A."
u"SILICON ARMOR LEVEL 2 - IMPROVED SILICON ARMOR THAT INCREASES PROTECTION AGAINST MOST WEAPONS BY 30% OVER LEVEL 1. DOES NOT IMPROVE PROTECTION AGAINST ULTRASONIC AND SOLITON FIELDS."
u"SILICON ARMOR LEVEL 3 - IMPROVED SILICON ARMOR THAT INCREASES PROTECTION AGAINST MOST WEAPONS BY 60% OVER LEVEL 1. DOES NOT IMPROVE PROTECTION AGAINST ULTRASONIC AND SOLITON FIELDS."
u"SILICON ARMOR LEVEL 4 - IMPROVED SILICON ARMOR THAT INCREASES PROTECTION AGAINST MOST WEAPONS BY 100% OVER LEVEL 1. DOES NOT IMPROVE PROTECTION AGAINST ULTRASONIC AND SOLITON FIELDS."
u"UPGRADE REGENERATION SPEED - A VITALLY IMPORTANT TECHNOLOGY THAT INCREASES THE RATE OF REGENERATION OF ALL SILICON SUBS AND STRUCTURES BY 100%."

u"ION DEFENSIVE SHEATH (20%) - A PROTECTIVE SCREEN THAT IS AUTOMATICALLY INSTALLED IN ALL SUBS ONCE RESEARCHED. IT REDUCES THE DAMAGE CAUSED BY LASER AND ENERGY WEAPONS, EXCLUDING HF CANNONS, BY 20%."

u"ION DEFENSIVE SHEATH (30%) - A PROTECTIVE SCREEN THAT IS AUTOMATICALLY INSTALLED IN ALL SUBS ONCE RESEARCHED. IT REDUCES THE DAMAGE CAUSED BY LASER AND ENERGY WEAPONS, EXCLUDING HF CANNONS, BY 30%."

u"ION DEFENSIVE SHEATH (40%) - A PROTECTIVE SCREEN THAT IS AUTOMATICALLY INSTALLED IN ALL SUBS ONCE RESEARCHED. IT REDUCES THE DAMAGE CAUSED BY LASER AND ENERGY WEAPONS, EXCLUDING HF CANNONS, BY 40%."

u"LASER REPLENISH SHEATH - THIS TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS SILICON SUBS TO ABSORB 50% OF ENEMY LASER WEAPON ATTACKS AND USE THE ENERGY TO RECHARGE THEIR BATTERIES. THIS SPECIAL HULL COATING WILL AUTOMATICALLY BE APPLIED TO SUBS ONCE RESEARCHED AND DOES NOT REDUCE THE DAMAGE CAUSED BY LASER WEAPONS."

u"PSY-SHIELD - A SPECIALIST TECHNOLOGY DESIGNED TO REDUCE THE EFFECTS OF A PSYCHOTRON. THIS ALLOWS THE USE OF A SPECIAL DISPERSION FIELD INSTALLED ON A VERMIN. THE FIELD IS AUTOMATICALLY ACTIVATED WHEN THE VERMIN ENTERS THE RANGE OF AN ENEMY PSY FIELD AND PROTECTS SUBS WITHIN A GIVEN RANGE OF THE VERMIN. THE SHIELD IS POWERED BY SPECIAL BATTERIES, WHICH, ONCE DEPLETED, CAUSE THE SHIELD TO DEACTIVATE UNTIL THE BATTERIES ARE FULLY CHARGED."
u"ANTIULTRASONIC SCREEN - A PROTECTIVE SCREEN THAT IS AUTOMATICALLY INSTALLED IN ALL SUBS ONCE RESEARCHED. IT REDUCES THE DAMAGE CAUSED BY ULTRASONIC GENERATORS BY 25%."

u"ION FIELD GENERATOR - ION FIELD TECHNOLOGY REDUCES THE DAMAGE CAUSED BY ANY WEAPON BY 50%. THE FIELD IS GENERATED BY AN ION FIELD GENERATOR, WHICH MAY PROTECT UP TO TWO STRUCTURES SIMULTANEOUSLY. THE FIELD IS NOT MOBILE AND THUS CANNOT PROTECT SUBS. IF TWO STRUCTURES ARE PROTECTED THE FIELD IS DISTRIBUTED BETWEEN THE TWO SUCH THAT THE AGGREGATE TOTAL EFFECT IS A MAXIMUM OF 50%."

u"MOLECULAR REPAIR FACILITY - ESSENTIALLY A MECHANISM TO CLONE DESTROYED SILICON UNITS, THE MOLECULAR REPAIR FACILITY REBUILDS A UNIT BASED ON ITS DNA STRUCTURE. ONCE THIS TECHNOLOGY IS AVAILABLE ALL UNITS ARE EQUIPPED WITH SPECIAL BIOCAPSULES THAT STORE THEIR DNA PATTERN. WHEN A UNIT IS DESTROYED THE BIOCAPSULE IS RELEASED. A BIOCOLLECTOR SUB CAN THEN RETRIEVE THE CAPSULE AND RETURN IT TO THE MOLECULAR REPAIR FACILITY FOR REBUILD."
u"MOVEMENT LEVEL 2 - UPGRADE TO SUB ENGINES THAT INCREASES SPEED BY 25% OVER LEVEL 1."
u"MOVEMENT LEVEL 3 - UPGRADE TO SUB ENGINES THAT INCREASES SPEED BY 75% OVER LEVEL 1."
u"MOVEMENT LEVEL 4 - UPGRADE TO SUB ENGINES THAT INCREASES SPEED BY 100% OVER LEVEL 1."
u"TORPEDO EVASION - IMPROVES SUB ANTI-TORPEDO MANEUVERS TO ASSIST IN AVOIDING LOW-SPEED WEAPONS SUCH AS TORPEDOES, SHELLS AND ENERGY CHARGES."

u"ION CASSETTE SHELLS - IONIC ENERGY-BASED WEAPON DESIGNED FOR DAMAGING MULTIPLE ENEMY SUBS AND STRUCTURES AT THE SAME TIME. THIS TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS THE PRODUCTION ESCORT CLASS SUBS THAT DO NOT REQUIRE AMMUNITION."

u"BHE SHELLS - BALLISTIC HIGH EXPLOSIVE SHELLS THAT CAN BE LAUNCHED BY DREADNOUGHTS. THESE SHELLS ARE ABLE TO REACH AND DAMAGE GROUPS OF SUBS AND STRUCTURES THAT ARE INACCESSIBLE TO NORMAL WEAPONS. THEY ARE PRODUCED IN AN ARSENAL."

u"NEURO-PARALYSIS SHELLS - CONTAINING A NEURO-PARALYSIS GAS THESE SHELLS ARE DESIGNED TO PENETRATE ENEMY SUBMARINES AND THEN RELEASE THE GAS TO IMMOBILE THE CREW FOR SEVERAL SECONDS, MAKING THE ENEMY A SITTING DUCK FOR OTHER WEAPONS. THE SHELLS ARE MADE IN AN ARSENAL AND CARRIED BY A NEW CLASS OF SUBMARINE, THE PARALYSIS PROBE."
u"ENEMY CAPTURE - THIS IMPORTANT TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS SPECIALIST USURPER SUBS TO CAPTURE ENEMY STRUCTURES."

u"BIO-ACID SHELLS - DESIGNED TO 'SPLATTER' AGAINST AN ENEMY'S HULL ON IMPACT, THESE SHELLS CONTAIN A POWERFUL ACID THAT WILL CORRODE SUBS AND STRUCTURES. THESE SHELLS ARE VERY POWERFUL AND REQUIRE SPECIAL CONTAINMENT THUS THEY ARE CARRIED BY A SPECIALIST CLASS OF SUBMARINE, THE BIO-ACID ASSAULTER. THE SHELLS ARE PRODUCED AT AN ARSENAL."

u"ACOUSTIC MINES - MINES PROVIDE A STRONG DEFENSE FOR ANY BASE AGAINST ENEMY SUBS. ACOUSTIC MINES ARE PARTICULARLY EFFECTIVE AS THEY CAN BE SET TO DETONATE ONLY FOR PARTICULAR SUB CLASSES, THUS ENSURING THE MAXIMUM DAMAGE TO AN ATTACKING FORCE. THESE MINES ARE PRODUCED AT AN ARSENAL AND ARE CARRIED BY A BIO-ACID ASSAULTER."

u"VACUUM BOMB - THE ULTIMATE SILICON MASS DESTRUCTION WEAPON. VACUUM QUAKE BOMBS ARE TACTICAL WEAPONS DESIGNED TO ATTACK LARGE GROUPS OF ENEMY SUBS AND STRUCTURES. DOING AN EQUIVALENT AMOUNT OF DAMAGE TO LASER BOMBS AND THERMO-NUCLEAR ROCKETS, THIS WEAPON IS PRODUCED AT ARSENALS AND LAUNCHED BY VACUUM BOMB LAUNCHERS. IT WORKS BY CREATING A VACUUM AT THE POINT OF IMPACT THAT CAUSES A HUGE CONCUSSION WAVE IN THE NEARBY REGION."
u"UPGRADE BIO-ACID SHELLS - INCREASES THE STRENGTH OF BIO-ACID SHELLS BY 50%."

u"HIGH-RANGE EXPLORER - THIS ALLOWS THE CREATION OF EXPLORER SUBS, WHICH CONTAIN SPECIALIST EQUIPMENT FOR EXPLORING THE MAP. THIS INCLUDES ENHANCED SONAR AND VISUAL RANGE AND THE ABILITY TO TELEPORT THEMSELVES TO ANY PART OF THE MAP."
u"UPGRADE ARSENAL - AN IMPORTANT UPGRADE FOR LARGE FORCES, THIS REDUCES THE PRODUCTION TIME OF ALL WEAPONS AT AN ARSENAL BY 25%. IT DOES NOT CHANGE THE COST OF MAKING THE WEAPONS."
u"UPGRADE DPT GUN RANGE - INCREASES THE RANGE OF THE DOUBLE PLASMA TURRET GUN BY 30%."
u"ENERGY SHELL LEVEL 2 - A GENERAL ENERGY CHARGE UPGRADE THAT PROVIDES AN INCREASE IN CHARGE FOCUS TO RAISE DAMAGE BY 40% OVER LEVEL 1."
u"ENERGY SHELL LEVEL 3 - A GENERAL ENERGY CHARGE UPGRADE THAT PROVIDES AN INCREASE IN CHARGE FOCUS TO RAISE DAMAGE BY 80% OVER LEVEL 1."
u"UPGRADE ION REFLECTOR (50% SCREEN) - THIS IMPROVES THE REFLECTION EFFECTIVENESS OF ION REFLECTORS TO 50% OF INFLICTED DAMAGE. IT DOES NOT REDUCE THE RECHARGE TIME FOR DEPLETED REFLECTORS."
u"BHE SHELL RANGE UPGRADE - AN UPGRADE TO THE AIMING SYSTEMS OF DREADNOUGHTS, THIS INCREASES THE RANGE OF BHE SHELLS BY 20%."
u"PARALYTIC WEAPON LEVEL 2 - THIS UPGRADE HAS A DOUBLE IMPACT. IT RAISES THE IMPACT DAMAGE OF NEURO-PARALYSIS SHELLS BY 30% AND INCREASES THE EFFECTIVE TIME OF THE GAS BY 25% OVER LEVEL 1."
u"PARALYTIC WEAPON LEVEL 3 - THE SECOND NEURO-PARALYSIS SHELL UPGRADE, THIS INCREASES IMPACT DAMAGE BY 60% AND THE DURATION OF THE GAS'S EFFECTS BY 50% OVER LEVEL 1."

u"ENERGY SHIELD NEUTRALIZATION - A SPECIAL UPGRADE TO NEURO-PARALYSIS GAS, THIS ALLOWS THREE HITS BY NEURO-PARALYSIS SHELLS TO DESTROY THE PROTECTIVE SCREEN CREATED BY A POWER PROTECTOR REGARDLESS OF THE CONDITION OF THE SCREEN."

u"MOBILE REPAIR PLATFORM - TECHNOLOGY THAT ALLOWS THE PRODUCTION OF REPAIR PLATFORMS WHICH CAN BOTH REPAIR SUBS OF VARIOUS TYPES (EXCLUDING CYBERDOLPHINS AND CYBERWORMS) AND CARRY CARGO, LIKE SUBS, CONTAINERS AND SPECIAL CARGO. IT IS CHEAPER TO REPAIR UNITS ON THESE PLATFORMS THAN ON STATIONARY REPAIR DOCKS."

u"RESEARCH ENEMY CIPHER KEY - THIS TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS THE BUILDING OF CENTCOMPS TO TIE INTO THE ENEMY MILITARY COMPUTER NETWORK AND EXTRAPOLATE USEFUL INFORMATION ABOUT ENEMY SUBS, STRUCTURES AND RESOURCE LEVELS."

u"RAIDER EQUIPMENT - THIS TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS THE PRODUCTION OF A NEW CLASS OF SUBMARINE, THE RAIDER. THIS SUB HAS THE UNIQUE ABILITY TO CAPTURE ENEMY OBJECTS SUCH AS DEFENSIVE STRUCTURES FOR FURTHER USE AND TO GAIN ACCESS TO UNIQUE ENEMY TECHNOLOGIES. TIME PERIOD WITHIN WHICH ENEMY TECHNOLOGIES BECOME AVAILABLE FOR THE RESEARCH IS LIMITED. IT VARIES BETWEEN 10-30 SECONDS FROM THE MOMENT YOU CAPTURE AN ENEMY OBJECT AND DEPENDS ON THE TYPE OF THE OBJECT. YOU CAN START SIMULTANEOUS RESEARCH OF ENEMY TECHNOLOGIES, WHICH BECOME AVAILABLE FOR YOU AT SEVERAL RESLABS. THE RAIDER HAS GOOD ARMOR AND IS ARMED WITH A LIGHT LASER."

u"UPGRADE TO MOBILITY - ALLOWS STATIONARY DEFENSIVE STRUCTURES TO MOVE AND THUS CAN RADICALLY CHANGE THE OFFENSIVE AND DEFENSIVE OPTIONS OPEN TO A COMMANDER. DEFENSIVE STRUCTURES MOVE MUCH SLOWER THAN ANY SUB AND CANNOT BE SELF-REPAIRED WHILE MOVING. GENERALLY THEY WILL REQUIRE A SUBMARINE ESCORT IF MOVING THROUGH HOSTILE AREAS."

u"DISPERSER SCREEN TECHNOLOGY - ALLOWS THE CONSTRUCTION OF ANTI-SONAR SHIELDS, WHICH CREATE 'DEAD SPOTS' WHICH CANNOT BE PENETRATED BY ENEMY SONAR AND MAKE ENEMY SUBS USING STEALTH GENERATORS VISIBLE."
u"TELEPORTATION TECHNOLOGY - REVOLUTIONARY TECHNOLOGY THAT ALLOWS THE INSTANT TRANSPORTATION OF ANY SUB TO ANY SPOT ON THE MAP. A SPECIAL STRUCTURE, THE TELEPORT, IS USED TO TELEPORT OBJECTS."
u"CYBER TECHNOLOGY - THIS TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS CREATION AND UTILIZATION OF CYBERWORMS, A CYBER CREATURE THAT IS ABLE TO PENETRATE ENEMY SILOS AND CORIUM STORES AND STEAL ENEMY RESOURCES."
u"UPGRADE MUNITIONS FACTORY - IMPROVES THE PRODUCTIVITY OF MUNITION FACTORIES. AFTER THE UPGRADE THE PRODUCTION OF ALL TYPES OF AMMO INCREASES BY 1.5 TIMES."
u"ASDIC UPGRADE - ALLOWS ASDIC TO \"OPEN\" UNEXPLORED OR DISTANT MAP AREAS AND LOCATE ENEMIES."
u"UPGRADE MINE PRODUCTIVITY - INCREASES METAL AND CORIUM MINE PRODUCTIVITY BY 25% AND CORRESPONDINGLY REDUCES THE TIME REQUIRED TO LOAD AND UNLOAD CARGOSUBS."
u"IMPROVE REPAIR TECHNOLOGY - ACCELERATES THE REPAIR TIME OF SUBMARINES BY REPAIR DOCKS AND PLATFORMS BY 1.5 TIMES."
u"INCREASE TELEPORTER RECHARGE - THIS UPGRADE REDUCES BY 25% THE TIME REQUIRED FOR TELEPORT RECHARGES."
u"UPGRADE HACK ABILITY - THIS TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS CENTCOMPS GREATER ACCESS TO ENEMY DATABASE SYSTEMS SO THEY CAN GET MORE INFORMATION ABOUT THE ENEMY."

u"INCREASE INFORMATION SECURITY - THIS TECHNOLOGY INCREASES YOUR DATA PROTECTION, WHICH REDUCES THE SPEED OF ENEMY DATA INTRUSION BY 2 TIMES AND ALLOWS, WITH THE HELP OF A CENTCOMP, THE COMMANDER TO LOCATE THE OBJECT FROM WHERE THE INTRUSION WAS MADE."
u"DETECT TELEPORTATION - THIS TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS A TRANCENTER TO AUTOMATICALLY LOCATE AND INFORM THE COMMANDER ABOUT ENEMY TELEPORT ACTIVITIES, INCLUDING WHERE THEY ARE TELEPORTING FROM AND TO."
u"ENEMY CAPTURE UPGRADE - THIS TECHNOLOGY IMPROVES THE ABILITY OF USURPERS TO SUCCESSFULLY CAPTURE ENEMY STRUCTURES. IT REDUCES THE TIME IT TAKES TO CAPTURE THEM ON 20%."
u"LASER SNARE DETECTION - THIS TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS DEFENDERS TO DETECT AND DESTROY ENEMY LASER SNARES."
u"PHANTOM RECHARGE UPGRADE - THIS REDUCES THE TIME TO RECHARGE PHANTOM SUB STEALTH GENERATORS BY 50%."
u"EM TORPEDO UPGRADE - THIS UPGRADE INCREASES BY TWO TIMES THE AFTER-EFFECTS OF AN EM TORPEDO, THUS REDUCING THE REMAINING LIFETIME FOR UNITS DAMAGED BY THIS TORPEDO."

u"RAIDER EQUIPMENT UPGRADE - THIS UPGRADE INCREASES THE EFFECTIVENESS OF CAPTURE ATTACKS BY RAIDERS. IT REDUCES THE TIME REQUIRED TO CAPTURE AN ENEMY OBJECT ON 20% BUT DOES NOT INCREASE THE CHANCES OF CAPTURING IT. ALL RAIDERS ARE AUTOMATICALLY UPGRADED."
u"SPLINTER TORPEDO UPGRADE - THIS UPGRADE INCREASES THE DAMAGE FROM SPLINTER TORPEDOES BY 50%."
u"TORPEDO SPEED UPGRADE - THIS INCREASES TORPEDO SPEED BY 30%. IT DOES NOT AFFECT THE SPEED OF MINES OR ENERGY CHARGES."
u"HF-SHELL UPGRADE - THIS UPGRADE DOUBLES (100% INCREASE) HF-SHELL POWER USED BY BOTH SENTINELS AND HF CANNONS. FIRE RATE AND RANGE REMAIN UNCHANGED."

u"MARAUDER EQUIPMENT UPGRADE - THIS UPGRADE INCREASES THE EFFECTIVENESS OF CAPTURE ATTACKS BY MARAUDERS. IT REDUCES THE TIME REQUIRED TO CAPTURE AN ENEMY OBJECT ON 20% BUT DOES NOT INCREASE THE CHANCES OF CAPTURING IT. ALL MARAUDERS ARE AUTOMATICALLY UPGRADED."
u"TORPEDO SPEED UPGRADE - THIS INCREASES TORPEDO SPEED BY 30%. IT DOES NOT AFFECT THE SPEED OF MINES OR ENERGY CHARGES."
u"DEPTH && ACOUSTIC MINE DETECTION - THIS TECHNOLOGY AUTOMATICALLY UPGRADES MINE-LAYERS TO DETECT AND DESTROY ENEMY DEPTH AND ACOUSTIC MINES."

u"QUANTUM PARALYZER - THIS TECHNOLOGY ALLOWS THE CREATION OF A NEW TYPE OF STRUCTURE, QUANTUM PARALYZER, WHICH PARALYZES ENEMY SUBS WITHIN A CERTAIN RANGE FROM IT. IT DOES NOT REQUIRE OUTER ENERGY SOURCES BUT REQUIRES TIME TO RECHARGE ITS GENERATORS. THIS OBJECT CAN BE EFFECTIVELY USED AGAINST ENEMY TELEPORTATION ATTACKS."
